title: Do Models Share Safety Representations? Cross-Model Steering for Safe Visual Generation
summary: Recent progress in generative modeling has made safety control a central challenge, yet existing approaches remain largely model-specific, requiring retraining or tailored interventions for each new architecture. In this work, we ask whether safety can be represented as a portable latent direction, learned once and reused across heterogeneous generators. We introduce the first framework for cross-model safety steering, in which a safety direction is estimated in a source LLM from paired safe-unsafe prompts, transported to a target generator through a lightweight alignment fitted on benign data alone, and applied at inference time. Crucially, our pipeline never accesses unsafe data on the target side, isolating whether safety can be transferred through shared representation geometry. Beyond a single global direction, we also identify a multi-vector extension that captures category-specific safety behaviors, enabling more selective control. We evaluate our approach in text-to-image and text-to-video generation across diverse source-target model pairs. Across models, transferred safety directions achieve ASR reduction and CLIP-Score/FID trade-offs comparable to directions learned natively on the target model using unsafe data, while requiring no target-side unsafe data. This indicates that safety improvements do not come at the expense of generation quality. Our results point to a modular view of safety: safety-relevant behavior is not purely model-local, but can be controlled through latent directions that persist across models. This suggests a new path toward lightweight, reusable safety mechanisms that do not require target-side unsafe data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个跨模型安全引导框架，通过从源LLM估计安全方向并轻量对齐至目标生成模型（无需目标侧不安全数据），实现文本到图像/视频生成中的可迁移安全控制，实验表明其安全性与生成质量均接近本地训练方法。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型的安全控制方法多为模型专有，需要针对每种新架构重新训练或定制干预，缺乏可跨异构生成器复用的轻量级安全机制。
AI.method: 从源LLM中通过成对安全-不安全提示估计一个便携式安全方向，再通过仅在良性数据上训练的轻量对齐将其迁移至目标生成器，推理时施加该方向实现安全引导；此外提出多向量扩展以捕捉类别特异性安全行为。
AI.result: 在多种文本到图像/视频的源-目标模型对上，迁移的安全方向在不使用目标侧不安全数据的前提下，实现了与目标模型本地使用不安全数据学习相当的攻击成功率降低以及CLIP-Score/FID权衡。
AI.conclusion: 安全相关行为并非完全模型局部化，而是可以通过跨模型持久的潜在方向进行控制，这表明可构建轻量、可复用的安全机制，无需目标侧不安全数据即可实现安全改进且不牺牲生成质量。

title: BRepCLIP: Contrastive Multimodal Pretraining on BRep Primitives for CAD Understanding
summary: Learning representations of CAD models is a largely open problem. While 3D representation learning has flourished around point clouds and meshes, the native format of CAD - boundary representations BReps, which encodes exact parametric surfaces, curves, and their topology, has received little attention as a representation learning substrate. We introduce BRepCLIP, the first framework to align BRep geometry with language and image embeddings through contrastive pretraining. We model each CAD object as a sequence of face and edge tokens with separate discrete vocabularies for surface and curve geometry, augmented with spatial and semantic descriptors that capture surface types (e.g., cylindrical, torus, NURBS) and curve primitives (e.g., line, arc, B-spline). A transformer encoder aggregates these tokens into a global BRep embedding, aligned with CLIP's text and image encoders via a joint contrastive objective. BRepCLIP generates more discriminative and semantically grounded embeddings than existing point-based alternatives, improving Top-1 retrieval over OpenShape by 40.4%, 22.0%, and 23.9% on ABC, CADParser, and Automate, respectively, and improving zero-shot classification on FabWave by 15% in Top-1 score. We further demonstrate its utility as a CAD-aware similarity metric for evaluating text and image-conditioned CAD generation, establishing the importance of structure-aware pretraining for multimodal CAD understanding. Project page is available at https://muhammadusama100.github.io/BrepClip2026/

AI.tldr: BRepCLIP是首个将CAD边界表示（BRep）几何与语言和图像嵌入对齐的对比预训练框架，通过将CAD对象建模为面与边令牌序列并利用Transformer编码器聚合全局嵌入，在跨模态检索和零样本分类任务上显著超越基于点云的现有方法。
AI.motivation: CAD模型的原生格式是边界表示（BRep），其编码了精确的参数化曲面、曲线及其拓扑结构，但作为表示学习基元却鲜受关注；现有3D表示学习主要围绕点云和网格展开，缺乏对BRep结构感知的跨模态对齐方法。
AI.method: BRepCLIP将每个CAD对象建模为面令牌和边令牌的序列，分别为曲面和曲线几何构建独立的离散词汇表，并附加空间和语义描述符以捕获曲面类型（如圆柱面、圆环面、NURBS）和曲线基元（如直线、圆弧、B样条）；通过Transformer编码器将这些令牌聚合成全局BRep嵌入，再借助联合对比目标函数与CLIP的文本和图像编码器进行对齐。
AI.result: BRepCLIP生成的嵌入比基于点云的替代方案更具判别性和语义基础，在ABC、CADParser和Automate数据集上，Top-1检索相较于OpenShape分别提升40.4%、22.0%和23.9%，并在FabWave上的零样本分类Top-1得分提升15%。
AI.conclusion: BRepCLIP证明了结构感知预训练对于多模态CAD理解的重要性，可作为CAD感知的相似性度量用于评估文本和图像条件驱动的CAD生成任务，为BRep几何与语言、图像模态的对齐提供了首个有效框架。

title: Generic Triple-Latent Compression with Gated Associative Retrieval
summary: We study generic triple-latent sequence models that maintain a running token state and compressed pair-memory pathway to capture higher-order token interactions without benchmark-specific parsing. The triple-latent family improves a small Transformer baseline on byte-level WikiText-2 and on a tokenizer-based MiniMind language-model benchmark, while a recall-focused gated key-value retrieval extension improves associative recall but remains seed-sensitive and much slower in the current reference implementation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用三重潜在序列模型，通过维护运行令牌状态和压缩成对记忆路径来捕获高阶令牌交互，无需基准特定的解析，在字节级WikiText-2和基于分词器的MiniMind语言模型基准上改进了小型Transformer基线，而基于门控键值检索的扩展虽改善了关联记忆但存在种子敏感性和速度瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有序列模型在处理高阶令牌交互时往往依赖基准特定的解析策略，缺乏通用且高效的结构化记忆机制，难以在不引入额外先验知识的情况下统一捕获长距离依赖和成对令牌关系。
AI.method: 本文研究了通用三重潜在序列模型族，该模型维护一个运行令牌状态（running token state）和一个压缩成对记忆通路（compressed pair-memory pathway），用于在不依赖基准特定解析的情况下捕获高阶令牌交互；此外，还提出了一种以召回为重点的门控键值检索扩展（recall-focused gated key-value retrieval extension），以增强关联记忆能力。
AI.result: 在字节级WikiText-2和基于分词器的MiniMind语言模型基准上，三重潜在家族改进了小型Transformer基线性能；门控键值检索扩展在关联记忆任务上表现更优，但对随机种子敏感且在当前的参考实现中运行速度显著较慢。
AI.conclusion: 三重潜在序列模型提供了一种无需基准特定解析的通用高阶令牌交互建模方案，能有效提升小规模Transformer的语言建模性能；关联记忆扩展虽能改善回忆能力，但其种子敏感性和速度问题仍需进一步优化，为未来设计更高效且鲁棒的潜在记忆架构提供了方向。

title: What Should Agents Say? Action-state Communication for Efficient Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) built on large language models are typically organized around roles, pipelines, and turn schedules, while the content that agents pass to one another is often left as unconstrained natural language. However, this free-form communication can rapidly inflate token usage, consume the shared context window, and ultimately affect both system performance and inference cost. We analyze five common inter-agent communication strategies across two MAS topologies, finding that no fixed strategy is universally optimal. Instead, effective inter-agent messages consistently preserve action-centered information needed by downstream agents. Building on this, we propose the PACT (Protocolized Action-state Communication and Transmission), which treats inter-agent communication as a public state-update problem and projects each raw agent output into a compact action-state record before it enters shared history. Across different MAS topologies, PACT consistently improves the performance-cost trade-off, achieving comparable or stronger task performance with substantially fewer tokens. The gains extend to production coding harnesses: PACT lifts OpenHands' resolve rate at -10% tokens-per-resolved, and is resolve-neutral on SWE-agent while halving input tokens. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/iNLP-Lab/PACT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PACT协议，将多智能体系统中的智能体间通信转化为结构化的动作-状态记录，在多种拓扑结构下以显著更少的token消耗实现可比或更强的任务性能，并在生产级编码框架中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的多智能体系统通常依赖角色、流水线和轮次调度进行组织，但智能体间传递的内容多为无约束的自然语言，这种自由形式通信会快速膨胀token使用量、挤占共享上下文窗口，进而损害系统性能和增加推理成本，且现有研究缺乏对不同通信策略系统性的对比分析。
AI.method: 本文首先对五种常见智能体间通信策略在两种MAS拓扑结构下进行系统性分析，发现没有固定策略普遍最优，但有效的跨智能体消息一致地保留了下游智能体所需的以动作为中心的信息。基于此，提出PACT（Protocolized Action-state Communication and Transmission）协议，将智能体间通信重构为公开状态更新问题，在每条原始智能体输出进入共享历史之前，先将其投影为紧凑的动作-状态记录。
AI.result: PACT在多种MAS拓扑结构下持续改善了性能-成本权衡，以显著更少的token实现可比或更强的任务性能。在生产级编码框架中：PACT使OpenHands的解决率提升，同时每个已解决问题消耗的token减少10%；在SWE-agent上保持解决率不变，同时将输入token减半。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了多智能体通信中结构化动作-状态信息的核心价值，表明通过协议化压缩通信内容可以在不牺牲甚至提升任务性能的前提下大幅降低推理成本，为大规模多智能体系统的高效通信设计提供了重要指导方向。

title: UltraVR: A Diagnostic Ultra-Resolution Image-VQA Benchmark for Evidence-Grounded Reasoning
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) excel on visual question answering and multimodal reasoning benchmarks. Yet their capability on ultra-resolution images - where critical evidence is tiny, subtle, spatially distant, or distributed - remains unclear. Existing evaluations largely report final-answer accuracy, offering limited insight into whether models acquire and integrate the necessary visual evidence. We introduce UltraVR, a diagnostic benchmark for evidence-grounded visual reasoning over ultra-resolution images. UltraVR spans four high-value scenarios: CCTV surveillance, remote sensing (RS), whole-slide image (WSI) pathology, and industrial anomaly detection (AD). These domains pose complementary challenges: fine-grained object grounding in crowded CCTV scenes, long-range spatial comparison in RS, multi-scale evidence navigation in WSI, and subtle irregularity detection in repetitive industrial layouts. Beyond standard QA triples, each instance includes a structured ground-truth chain of thought with step-level questions, intermediate answers, and reasoning labels. These labels decompose reasoning into evidence grounding, local perception, quantification, evidence integration, and decision inference, enabling process-level diagnosis over black-box scoring. Using UltraVR, we evaluate frontier VLMs and show that current models remain far from reliable on ultra-resolution reasoning. Importantly, the structured annotations allow us to localize failures across the visual-to-decision pipeline: errors concentrate in evidence grounding and local perception, while downstream inference often recovers when intermediate visual facts are supplied. These findings demonstrate UltraVR as a diagnostic testbed for measuring not only whether VLMs answer correctly, but where their ultra-resolution reasoning process breaks.

AI.tldr: UltrVR是一个面向超分辨率图像的诊断基准数据集，通过结构化思维链标注（包含分步问题、中间答案和推理标签）对视觉-语言模型在证据驱动推理中的过程级失败模式进行精确定位，揭示当前模型在证据定位和局部感知环节存在主要瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）在标准视觉问答和多模态推理任务中表现优异，但在超分辨率图像场景下（关键证据微小、细微、空间分散或分布广泛）的推理能力尚不明确，且已有评估仅报告最终答案准确率，无法揭示模型是否真正获取并整合了必要的视觉证据，缺乏对推理过程的诊断能力。
AI.method: 提出UltrVR诊断基准，涵盖CCTV监控、遥感、全切片病理图像和工业异常检测四个高价值场景，每个实例在标准QA三元组之外还包含结构化的真值思维链，包含分步问题、中间答案和推理标签（将推理分解为证据定位、局部感知、量化、证据整合和决策推理五个阶段），支持对VLM的细粒度过程级诊断。
AI.result: 基于UltrVR对前沿VLM进行评估，发现当前模型在超分辨率推理任务上远未达到可靠水平；通过结构化标注定位失败模式，错误主要集中在证据定位和局部感知环节，而当下游中间视觉事实被提供时，推理阶段往往能够恢复。
AI.conclusion: UltrVR不仅能够评估VLM是否回答正确，更能精确诊断其超分辨率推理过程在何处断裂，揭示当前模型的核心瓶颈在于早期视觉证据获取而非下游推理能力，为未来模型改进提供了明确方向。

title: When Evidence is Sparse: Weakly Supervised Early Failure Alerting in Dialogs and LLM-Agent Trajectories
summary: Early failure alerting requires deciding, while a dialog or agent trajectory is still unfolding, whether to flag it as likely to fail. This is challenging because supervision is typically available only as a trajectory-level success/failure label while alerts must be raised from partial interactions. Prior early-classification methods often bridge this gap by assigning the terminal label to every prefix, treating every turn as failure evidence. We hypothesize that this prefix-label assumption is poorly matched to multi-turn language interactions, where evidence of eventual failure is sparse and often delayed. In this paper, we introduce a two-stage approach that learns from this sparse evidence structure and uses the resulting risk estimates for controllable early alerting. Specifically, our attention-based failure predictor learns sparse turn-level failure evidence from trajectory labels and uses it to estimate failure risk from partial histories. We then pair this predictor with $α$-STOP, a single preference-conditioned stopping policy that selects an accuracy-earliness operating point at inference time rather than training a separate trigger for each preference. Across five benchmarks spanning customer support, task-oriented dialog, persuasion, tool use, and planning, we first show that high-relevance failure evidence occupies only 4.7-11.3% of turns and first appears after 59.0-83.6\% of trajectories on average. We further show that the attention-based predictor improves Pareto-frontier quality (hypervolume) by 1-10\% over naive prefix supervision, and that the full system improves frontier quality by 3-42\% over state-of-the-art trigger policies while reducing training cost per operating point by 1-3 orders of magnitude.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段早期失败预警框架，通过注意力机制从轨迹级标签中学习稀疏的轮次级失败证据，并利用α-STOP策略在推理时实现可控的准确性-及时性权衡，在五个基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 早期失败预警面临监督信号（轨迹级成败标签）与预警需求（部分交互阶段）之间的粒度不匹配问题，现有的前缀标签假设（将终端标签直接赋给每个前缀）在多轮语言交互中表现不佳，因为失败证据稀疏且往往延迟出现。
AI.method: 本文提出两阶段方法：首先设计基于注意力的失败预测器，从轨迹级标签中学习稀疏的轮次级失败证据，并利用这些证据从部分历史中估计失败风险；然后结合α-STOP策略，这是一个单一偏好条件停止策略，能够在推理时选择不同的准确性-及时性运行点，无需为每个偏好单独训练触发策略。
AI.result: 在涵盖客服、任务型对话、说服、工具使用和规划等五个基准上，高度相关的失败证据仅占轮次的4.7-11.3%，且首次出现在轨迹平均进行59.0-83.6%的时刻；注意力预测器比朴素前缀监督方法在Pareto前沿质量（hypervolume）上提升1-10%；完整系统相比最先进的触发策略在Pareto前沿质量上提升3-42%，同时每个运行点的训练成本降低1-3个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明多轮语言交互中失败证据确实稀疏且延迟，验证了前缀标签假设的不适用性；所提出的两阶段框架通过解耦证据学习与可控停止，实现了高效且灵活的早期预警，在性能和训练效率上均显著优于现有方法。

title: LeanMarathon: Toward Reliable AI Co-Mathematicians through Long-Horizon Lean Autoformalization
summary: Long-horizon autoformalization of research mathematics fails not only at hard lemmas, but at scale: statements drift, dependencies tangle, context decays, and local repairs corrupt distant work. We present LeanMarathon, a multi-agent harness for reliable research-level Lean autoformalization. Its core abstraction is an evolving blueprint: a Lean file that serves simultaneously as formal proof skeleton, natural-language proof graph, and shared system of record. Four contract-scoped agents construct, audit, prove, and repair this blueprint. These agents are coordinated by a two-stage orchestrator that first stabilizes target fidelity through adversarial review and then discharges the proof directed acyclic graph (DAG) from its dynamic leaves upward in parallel CI-gated rounds. LeanMarathon turns one brittle multi-hour run into many local, recoverable, parallel transactions. We evaluate LeanMarathon on two recent research papers spanning four Erdős problems (#1051, #1196, #164, #1217). Across three autonomous runs, it formalizes all seven target theorems with no sorry, proving 258 lemmas and theorems. These results show that reliable AI co-mathematics requires not only stronger provers, but durable harnesses that preserve target fidelity across long mathematical developments. The code can be found at https://github.com/YuanheZ/LeanMarathon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 LeanMarathon，一种多智能体框架，通过演化蓝图抽象和两阶段编排器实现研究级 Lean 自动形式化，在四个 Erdős 问题上完成全部七个目标定理的形式化且不留 sorry，证明了可靠的 AI 协同数学不仅需要更强的证明器，还需要能够在长期数学开发中保持目标保真度的耐久框架。
AI.motivation: 长期研究数学的自动形式化不仅难在困难引理本身，更面临规模性问题：语句漂移、依赖缠结、上下文衰减以及局部修复破坏远程工作，现有方法缺少能够在大规模长期数学开发中保持目标保真度的可靠框架。
AI.method: LeanMarathon 的核心抽象是演化蓝图（evolving blueprint），即一个同时充当形式化证明骨架、自然语言证明图谱和共享系统记录的 Lean 文件；四个基于合约范围的智能体分别负责构建、审计、证明和修复该蓝图，并由两阶段编排器协调：第一阶段通过对抗性审查稳定目标保真度，第二阶段从动态叶节点开始向上以并行的 CI 门控回合消解证明有向无环图（DAG），将单个脆弱的长时间运行转化为多个局部、可恢复、并行的交易。
AI.result: 在覆盖四个 Erdős 问题（#1051、#1196、#164、#1217）的两篇近期研究论文上，三次自主运行中 LeanMarathon 形式化了全部七个目标定理，无任何 sorry，共证明 258 个引理和定理，展示了其在研究级数学自动形式化中的可靠性与规模化能力。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的 AI 协同数学不仅需要更强的证明器，还需要能够在长期数学开发中保持目标保真度的耐久框架；LeanMarathon 证明了通过蓝图抽象、多智能体协作和两阶段编排，可以可靠地处理研究级数学的自动形式化任务。

title: KV-Control: Parameter-Efficient K/V Injection for Trajectory-Controlled Text-to-Motion
summary: Text-conditioned 3D human motion models now synthesize plausible motions from prompts, but practical animation and embodied-agent workflows rarely stop at text: a character may need to follow a sketched root path, hit an end-effector target, or satisfy a multi-joint trajectory while still preserving the gait, style, and intent described by language. This exposes a control trade-off. A trajectory controller should be precise without overwriting the pretrained text-conditioned motion prior, yet existing solutions either duplicate large portions of the generator to regain per-layer control access or move much of the cost to test-time optimization. We introduce KV-Control, a compact attention-side control interface for frozen masked text-to-motion transformers. The key idea is to make geometric constraints available as memory inside self-attention rather than injecting them through a global pose token or enforcing them only at the output side. To support this interface, we co-design a part-tokenized motion substrate and controller: \textbf{PartVQ} learns anatomy-aligned part codebooks, T-Concat exposes each frame--part token as an attention-addressable site, and KV-Control injects control-conditioned key/value memories at every self-attention layer while preserving the pretrained query stream, text cross-attention, FFN, and all backbone weights. The resulting adapter adds only trainable injection parameters atop a shared trajectory encoder, yet tracks root and multi-joint constraints with sub-centimeter accuracy under the inherited refinement protocol while retaining text-conditioned motion quality. KV-Control reframes trajectory conditioning as lightweight memory retrieval, providing a small, precise, and transparent control interface for text-to-motion generation.

AI.tldr: KV-Control提出了一种轻量级注意力侧控制接口，通过将几何约束作为键值记忆注入冻结的文本到运动Transformer的每一层自注意力中，在不修改预训练骨干网络的前提下，实现了对文本条件化人体运动生成的高精度根轨迹和多关节轨迹控制。
AI.motivation: 现有文本驱动的人体运动生成模型能够从自然语言提示合成合理运动，但在实际动画和具身智能工作流中，用户还需求满足根轨迹、末端效应器目标或多关节轨迹等几何约束，同时保留文本描述的步态、风格和意图。现有方法要么需要复制大部分生成器以重新获得每层控制权限，参数开销巨大，要么将大量计算成本转移到测试时优化，缺乏一种既不覆盖预训练文本条件运动先验、又能实现精确轨迹控制的紧凑接口。
AI.method: KV-Control为冻结的掩码文本到运动Transformer设计了注意力侧控制接口，核心是让几何约束作为记忆存在于自注意力内部而非通过全局姿态令牌或输出端强制施加。为此协同设计了三个组件：PartVQ学习解剖学对齐的部位码本；T-Concat将每帧部位令牌暴露为注意力可寻址位点；KV-Control在每一层自注意力中注入控制条件化的键值记忆，同时保持预训练的查询流、文本交叉注意力、前馈网络和所有骨干权重不变，仅增加可训练的注入参数和一个共享轨迹编码器。
AI.result: KV-Control在继承原始精炼协议的前提下，实现了根轨迹和多关节约束的亚厘米级跟踪精度，同时保持了文本条件化运动的生成质量。该方法仅需在轨迹编码器之上添加少量可训练注入参数，参数效率显著优于需要复制生成器或依赖测试时优化的现有方案。
AI.conclusion: KV-Control将轨迹条件控制重新定义为轻量级记忆检索问题，为文本到运动生成提供了一种小型、精确且透明的控制接口。该工作表明，通过将几何约束作为注意力记忆注入而非修改模型权重或输出，可以在保持预训练生成先验完整性的同时实现高精度约束满足，为可控运动生成提供了一种高效、模块化的新范式。

title: CHASE: Adversarial Red-Blue Teaming for Improving LLM Safety using Reinforcement Learning
summary: Despite advances in safety alignment, prompt-rewriting attacks such as persona modulation, fictional framing and persuasion-based reformulation, can bypass safety filters even on frontier models. Existing defenses either rely on non-scalable human curation or white-box optimisation that overfits to specific model internals, leaving aligned models brittle against the very class of adaptive black-box adversaries they will face in deployment. To address this gap, we introduce CHASE (Co-evolutionary Hardening through Adversarial Safety-Escalation), a closed-loop red-blue teaming framework in which a black-box attacker and a safety-aligned defender co-evolve. The attacker is trained via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) under a multiplicative reward that jointly enforces bypass effectiveness and intent fidelity, while the defender is hardened on the harvested adversarial rewrites through a two-stage GRPO + rejection-sampled SFT pipeline balanced with benign data. Evaluated on BeaverTails and JailbreakBench against five held-out attack families (PAIR, TAP, AutoDAN, PAP, Translation), CHASE cuts mean StrongREJECT score by 43.2\% with 0\% false-refusal on benign prompts. Beyond the headline result, CHASE shows that template-free RL exploration recovers latent attack primitives that transfer across mechanistically distinct attack families, suggesting a path toward LLM safety hardening that generalises beyond the narrow distributions achieved thus far in adversarial training.

AI.tldr: 提出CHASE框架，通过GRPO驱动的红蓝对抗协同进化与两阶段防御硬化，在不牺牲良性提示拒绝率的前提下，使强拒绝评分降低43.2%，并发现无模板强化学习能恢复跨攻击家族迁移的潜在攻击原语，显著提升安全对齐的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有提示重写攻击（如角色调制、虚构框架、说服式重写）能绕过前沿模型的安全过滤器，而现有防御要么依赖不可扩展的人工策展，要么使用白盒优化过拟合特定模型内部结构，导致对齐模型在面对部署中自适应的黑盒攻击者时依然脆弱。
AI.method: 提出CHASE（协同进化对抗安全升级）闭环红蓝对抗框架：黑盒攻击者通过乘法奖励（兼顾绕过效果与意图保真度）的GRPO训练，安全对齐防御者则利用收割的对抗重写数据，经两阶段GRPO+拒绝采样SFT流程并平衡良性数据进行硬化。
AI.result: 在BeaverTails和JailbreakBench上，针对五种留出攻击家族（PAIR, TAP, AutoDAN, PAP, Translation），CHASE使平均StrongREJECT评分降低43.2%，且良性提示的误拒率为0%。
AI.conclusion: 无模板强化学习探索能够恢复跨机制不同攻击家族的潜在攻击原语，这为超越现有对抗训练中狭窄分布的LLM安全硬化泛化提供了可行路径。

title: Harnessing Generalist Agents for Contextualized Time Series
summary: Time series are often embedded in rich contexts that are essential for holistic modeling. Moreover, real-world practitioners often require end-to-end workflows for analyzing temporal dynamics, where widely studied tasks such as forecasting are only one step in a broader solution loop. While generalist AI agents offer a promising interface for such workflows under complex contexts, they still operate primarily in textual spaces that are not fully aligned with structured temporal signals. In this work, we introduce TimeClaw, an agentic harness framework for time series that equips generalist LLM agents with the time series-native runtime support needed for contextualized temporal reasoning. TimeClaw integrates executable temporal tools for grounded and auditable analysis, experience-driven capability evolution for creating reusable analytical routines, and episodic multimodal memory for retrieving relevant reasoning traces. Together, these components unlock harnessed open-ended temporal reasoning with contextual information. Extensive evaluation on multiple benchmarks covering diverse tasks across energy, finance, weather, traffic, and other real-world domains demonstrates improved performance of TimeClaw. Code is available at https://github.com/iDEA-iSAIL-Lab-UIUC/TimeClaw.

AI.tldr: TimeClaw 是一个面向时间序列的智能体框架，通过为通用大语言模型智能体提供时序原生运行时支持（包括可执行时序工具、经验驱动的能力演进和情景化多模态记忆），实现语境化开放时间推理，在能源、金融、天气、交通等多个实际领域基准上取得性能提升。
AI.motivation: 时间序列通常嵌入丰富的上下文中，而实际应用需要端到端工作流来分析时间动态，但现有通用AI智能体主要在文本空间中运行，未能与结构化时间信号完全对齐，缺乏时间序列原生运行时支持来进行语境化时间推理。
AI.method: TimeClaw 提出了一种智能体框架，包含三个核心组件：可执行时序工具集（支持可追溯和可审计的时序分析）、经验驱动的能力演化机制（创建可复用的分析例程）、以及情景化多模态记忆（检索相关推理轨迹），使通用大语言模型智能体能够进行语境化的开放时间推理。
AI.result: 在涵盖能源、金融、天气、交通等多个实际领域的多样化任务基准上，TimeClaw 框架展示了相对于基线方法的性能提升，验证了其在多种时间序列分析任务中的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: TimeClaw 通过将通用LLM智能体与时间序列原生运行时支持相结合，弥合了文本空间与结构化时间信号之间的鸿沟，为实际场景中的端到端时间序列分析工作流提供了一种可行的解决方案，并开源了代码以推动进一步研究。

title: ShotCrop$^3$: Cropping Human-Centric Images into Cinematic Triple-Shot Compositions
summary: Prior work on aesthetic composition typically produces a single aesthetically pleasing crop, overlooking the narrative value of composing multiple shots from one scene. In practice, multi-shot composition is critical for downstream creative workflows: commercial posters often require multiple crops with different emphases (e.g., context, subject, and emotion/product details) to present key story beats. Therefore, we propose \textbf{Triple-Shot Compositions (TSC)}, a composition task that generates a three-shot set -- establishing, medium, and close-up -- from a single human-centric image, each paired with a brief shot description to support visual narration. To learn TSC with limited expert annotations, we introduce \textbf{ShotCrop} which undergoes a three-stage training process: it first applies Chain-of-Thought supervised fine-tuning to establish basic reasoning and aesthetic shot-cropping skills, then performs semi-supervised fine-tuning with high-confidence pseudo labels to further enhance aesthetic capability, and is finally optimized with Group Relative Policy Optimization for \textbf{ShotCrop} (GRPO-S) using a composite reward tailored for it. Specifically, our pseudo-labeling strategy combines MLLM-based scoring, aesthetic assessment, and CLIP similarity to retain high-confidence training signals. In addition, we present TSC-Bench, a benchmark of 1.2k expert-annotated test cases. Notably, ShotCrop achieves an average improvement of \textbf{2.82} times over GPT-5 in shot localization accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出 Triple-Shot Compositions (TSC) 任务，从单张人物图像生成远景、中景、特写三镜头组合及镜头描述；并设计 ShotCrop 模型，通过 CoT 微调、半监督伪标签和 GRPO-S 强化学习三阶段训练实现，在 TSC-Bench 上镜头定位准确率平均提升 2.82 倍于 GPT-5。
AI.motivation: 现有美学构图工作通常只生成单一最优裁剪结果，忽略了从同一场景中组合多个镜头以支持视觉叙事的实践需求，而商业海报等下游创作流程中多镜头构图对呈现故事关键节拍至关重要。
AI.method: 提出 ShotCrop 模型，采用三阶段训练：首先通过 CoT 监督微调建立基础推理与美学裁剪能力；其次结合 MLLM 评分、美学评估和 CLIP 相似度的高置信度伪标签进行半监督微调；最后使用针对性的组合奖励进行 GRPO-S 强化学习优化。
AI.result: 构建了包含 1.2k 专家标注测试样本的 TSC-Bench 基准；ShotCrop 在镜头定位准确率上平均达到 GPT-5 的 2.82 倍提升。
AI.conclusion: 多镜头构图任务 TSC 及其三阶段训练方法 ShotCrop 有效弥补了从单图生成叙事性镜头组合的技术空白，在少量专家标注下即可显著超越大模型基线，为下游创意工作流提供了实用解决方案。

title: ArcANE: Do Role-Playing Language Agents Stay in Character at the Right Time?
summary: Role-playing language agents (RPLAs) should play characters whose values and behavior evolve as the story progresses, not maintain a fixed persona. Existing benchmarks measure factual recall at a given chapter, not whether responses align with the character's psychological trajectory, especially in scenarios the source text never explores. We introduce ArcANE (Arc-Aware Narrative Evaluation), an automatically constructed benchmark spanning 17 novels and 80 principal characters. A Character Arc segments the narrative into phases along a psychological axis, and each probe poses the same scenario across phases, spanning both situations within the source text and situations beyond it. Across six models and six context modes, conditioning on the Character Arc tops every other context strategy on every model, and the gap is largest on scenarios outside the source text where retrieval has nothing to find. We further fine-tune open-weight models on the same data to obtain ArcANE-8B/32B, which widen the Arc advantage even more on scenarios outside the source text.

AI.tldr: ArcANE 是一个面向角色扮演语言代理的自动构建基准，通过将叙事分割为心理轴上的角色弧段并在同一场景跨弧段提问，来评估代理是否具备动态角色一致性，实验表明基于角色弧的条件生成在所有策略中表现最优，尤其在超出源文本的未见场景中优势最为显著。
AI.motivation: 现有角色扮演语言代理基准仅测量角色在给定章节中的事实回忆能力，无法评估代理是否能在故事推进中动态调整角色的价值观与行为以匹配角色的心理轨迹，特别是在源文本未探索的全新场景中，这一问题尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 论文提出 ArcANE（Arc-Aware Narrative Evaluation）自动构建基准，涵盖 17 部小说和 80 个主要角色；将叙事沿心理轴分割为若干角色弧段（Character Arc），对每个弧段设计同一场景的探测问题，场景既包括源文本内情境也包括源文本外情境；此外，基于相同数据微调开源权重模型得到 ArcANE-8B/32B。
AI.result: 在 6 种模型和 6 种上下文模式下，基于角色弧的条件生成在所有上下文策略中的表现均优于其他方法，在源文本外场景中优势最大；微调后的 ArcANE-8B/32B 进一步扩大了角色弧在源文本外场景上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 将叙事结构的角色弧信息纳入上下文是提升角色扮演语言代理动态一致性的有效策略，尤其在检索无法提供任何信息的未见场景中；自动构建的角色弧基准为评估和训练具有叙事感知能力的代理提供了可行框架。

title: Minimizing the Hidden Cost of Scales: Graph-Guided Ultra-Low-Bit Quantization for Large Language Models
comment: Preprint. 18 pages, 10 figures, 7 tables, including appendix
summary: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is critical for the efficient deployment of large language models (LLMs). Recent ultra-low-bit PTQ methods rely on rigid weight-saliency assumptions or position heuristics, introducing substantial hidden scaling overhead. We propose SAGE-PTQ (Saliency-Aware Graph-guided Efficient PTQ), a novel ultra-low-bit quantization framework for LLMs that minimizes hidden scaling cost. SAGE-PTQ separates salient and unsalient weights using distributional statistics, then models subsampled unsalient weights as a sparse graph to estimate the optimal number of groups per layer. SAGE-PTQ applies dual-mode quantization, assigning multi-bit precision to salient weights and binarizing unsalient weights. To reduce scaling overhead, SAGE-PTQ uses one per-channel scale for salient weights and one scalar per unsalient group. Finally, SAGE-PTQ implements adaptive saliency thresholding to select the optimal saliency ratio per matrix. SAGE-PTQ achieves 1.03 weight bits and only 0.004 scaling bits per matrix on average, outperforming state-of-the-art methods such as BiLLM and PB-LLM. On LLaMA-3-8B, SAGE-PTQ achieves 6.74 WikiText2 perplexity, compared to 55.8 for BiLLM, while using less than 50% of BiLLM's GPU memory. On LLaMA-2-70B, SAGE-PTQ provides 1.5x faster decoding on one NVIDIA L40 GPU, demonstrating practical inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: SAGE-PTQ提出了一种基于显著性感知和图引导的超低比特量化框架，通过分离显著/非显著权重、稀疏图建模分组和双模量化，在LLaMA-3-8B上实现1.03权值比特和6.74困惑度，显著优于BiLLM等现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有超低比特后训练量化方法严重依赖刚性的权值显著性假设或位置启发式策略，导致引入大量隐藏的缩放开销，制约了LLM在资源受限设备上的高效部署。
AI.method: SAGE-PTQ框架首先利用分布统计量将权值区分为显著与非显著两类，随后将下采样后的非显著权值建模为稀疏图以估计每层最优分组数；对显著权值分配多比特精度，对非显著权值进行二值化，并为显著权值使用逐通道缩放因子、为非显著权值使用逐组标量缩放以降低开销；最后通过自适应显著性阈值选择每矩阵的最优显著性比例。
AI.result: SAGE-PTQ平均每矩阵仅需1.03权值比特和0.004缩放比特；在LLaMA-3-8B上达到6.74的WikiText2困惑度（BiLLM为55.8），且GPU显存消耗不到BiLLM的50%；在LLaMA-2-70B上单张NVIDIA L40 GPU实现1.5倍解码加速。
AI.conclusion: SAGE-PTQ通过显著性感知分组与图引导稀疏建模，在超低比特量化中同时实现了极低的权值/缩放比特开销与优异的模型性能，验证了自适应阈值和双模量化在LLM高效部署中的有效性。

title: Let It Be Simple: One-Step Action Generation for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Diffusion-based vision-language-action (VLA) models often inherit the image-generation view: actions are generated by iterative denoising. We argue that VLA action generation has a different condition-target structure: the policy is conditioned on rich observations, language, and state, but predicts only a compact, low-dimensional action chunk. Under this asymmetry, strong one-step action generation should not necessarily require the advanced one-step methods developed for image synthesis. We keep standard velocity prediction and add no teacher model, distillation stage, or auxiliary objective; in our main recipe, we simply bias the training time distribution toward high-noise states. We first isolate the effect in a controlled MNIST grid-to-sequence task, then test it with extensive robot-policy experiments. Across standard LIBERO, LIBERO-Plus, and LIBERO-Pro, one-step policies trained with high-noise biased schedules generally match ten-step decoding under the same recipe, and on standard LIBERO can exceed ten-step policies trained with a uniform time distribution. A real-robot bimanual YAM RSS evaluation gives a small-sample cross-architecture check of the same sampler trend. On a 1.4B VLM model with a 30M action head, one-step decoding reaches 95.6\% on LIBERO-Long. These results show that strong one-step VLA action generation can emerge from standard diffusion training, without importing the full few-step diffusion machinery developed for image generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出，扩散式视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的动作生成具有条件-目标不对称性（高维条件 vs 低维动作），通过简单地偏置训练时的高噪声时间步分布，无需教师模型、蒸馏或辅助目标，即可实现与十步解码相当甚至更优的单步动作生成性能。
AI.motivation: 扩散式VLA模型通常继承图像生成领域的多步迭代去噪范式，但作者指出VLA动作生成具有不同的条件-目标结构：策略以丰富的观测、语言和状态为条件，但仅预测低维紧凑的动作块。在这种不对称性下，强单步动作生成不应依赖于为图像合成开发的复杂少步扩散机制。
AI.method: 使用标准的速度预测（velocity prediction）训练，不引入教师模型、蒸馏阶段或辅助目标；核心方法是在训练时调整噪声时间步的采样分布，使其偏向高噪声状态。先在MNIST grid-to-sequence任务中分离验证该效应，然后在LIBERO、LIBERO-Plus、LIBERO-Pro基准及真实机器人双任务YAM RSS上进行广泛实验。
AI.result: 在标准LIBERO、LIBERO-Plus和LIBERO-Pro上，使用高噪声偏置训练的单步策略通常匹配同设置下十步解码的性能，且在标准LIBERO上可超越使用均匀时间分布训练的十步策略。在1.4B VLM模型搭配30M动作头的架构上，单步解码在LIBERO-Long上达到95.6%。真实机器人实验提供了小样本跨架构验证。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，强单步VLA动作生成可以通过标准的扩散训练自然涌现，无需完整引入图像生成领域发展的少步扩散技术，只需调整训练时的噪声分布即可实现高效的单步策略推理。

title: AURA: Intent-Directed Probing for Implicit-Need Surfacing in Situated LLM Agents
comment: Submitted to EMNLP 2026. Code, simulator, and benchmark: https://github.com/innovation64/AURA
summary: A situated query like "where is Lin Wei?" often encodes more than its literal content: the user may also want to know whether Lin Wei is free, in a good mood, or worth interrupting now. Standard tool-use agents answer the literal question and stop. AURA inserts an inference step between scene perception and tool use that produces an IntentFrame: a structured estimate of the implicit need with a scalar gap score that controls per-query probe budget and tool selection. On a 100-query four-scene implicit-intent benchmark, AURA improves implicit-need coverage over ReAct-style probing (Delta = +0.07, p < 10^-6); three of four scenes are individually significant, the gain reproduces on a second backbone, and a prompt ablation attributes the lift to gap calibration rather than answer memorisation. On factual lookup the controller trades raw accuracy for 82% fewer probes and zero forbidden-tool violations on a privacy-sensitive slice; scope conditions are detailed in Limitations. Code, simulator, and benchmark are released at https://github.com/innovation64/AURA.

AI.tldr: AURA 提出了一种在场景感知与工具使用之间插入意图推理步骤的框架，通过结构化 IntentFrame 估计用户隐式需求并自适应控制查询预算和工具选择，在隐式意图基准上显著提升覆盖度，同时在事实查询任务中以少量探针代价实现零违规。
AI.motivation: 传统工具使用智能体只能对字面查询做出响应，无法理解用户查询中隐含的深层意图（如询问某人的状态或是否适合打扰），导致回答停留在表面、缺乏上下文感知能力。
AI.method: AURA 在场景感知与工具使用之间插入一个推理步骤，生成意图框架（IntentFrame），其中包含隐式需求的结构化估计和一个标量差距分数（gap score），该分数用于控制每次查询的探测预算和工具选择策略。
AI.result: 在包含100条查询、四个场景的隐式意图基准上，AURA 在隐式需求覆盖度上比 ReAct 风格的探测方法提升了0.07（p < 10^-6），其中三个场景达到统计显著；该增益在第二个骨干模型上可复现，消融实验表明提升来自差距校准而非答案记忆。在事实查询任务中，控制器以牺牲一定原始准确率为代价，实现了82%的探针减少，并在隐私敏感切片上达到零违规。
AI.conclusion: AURA 通过显式建模隐式意图和自适应探测预算，有效弥合了字面查询与用户真实需求之间的鸿沟，在隐私敏感场景中兼具效率与安全性，但论文也详细说明了其适用范围的局限性。

title: Insurance of Agentic AI
summary: Agentic artificial intelligence (AI) systems are transforming the risk landscape by extending beyond information generation to autonomous planning, tool invocation, decision execution, and persistent modification of digital and physical environments. These capabilities introduce novel exposures that do not fit neatly within traditional insurance categories such as cyber, professional liability, product liability, or directors and officers coverage. This paper examines the emerging insurance market for agentic AI and develops a framework for understanding its underwriting, pricing, reinsurance, and product-design implications. We characterize agentic AI as a continuum of autonomy and delegated authority, emphasizing the distinction between informational outputs and systems capable of independently generating insured events through external actions. We analyze major risk pathways, including hallucinations, prompt-injection attacks, autonomous decision errors, model drift, dependency failures, and cyber-physical harms, and evaluate how existing insurance products are adapting to address these exposures. The paper further proposes an actuarial framework based on exposure assessment, scenario analysis, dependency mapping, and accumulation-risk management, drawing parallels to the evolution of cyber insurance. Finally, we present a coordinated insurance architecture that integrates cyber, technology errors and omissions, product liability, performance-warranty, and affirmative AI-liability coverages through explicit allocation mechanisms and dedicated AI aggregates. The analysis suggests that the future of agentic-AI insurance lies not in a single monoline product but in a layered ecosystem of complementary coverages supported by improved governance, transparency, telemetry, and regulatory clarity.

AI.tldr: 本文研究代理型AI系统带来的新型风险及其保险市场，提出基于自主性和授权连续统的分析框架、精算方法和分层保险架构，指出未来方向并非单一险种，而是由多种互补险种构成的生态系统。
AI.motivation: 代理型AI系统具备自主规划、工具调用、决策执行和环境修改能力，超越了传统信息生成范畴，带来了现有保险类别（如网络险、专业责任险、产品责任险等）无法覆盖的新型风险敞口，亟需构建专门的承保、定价、再保险和产品设计框架。
AI.method: 本文提出将代理型AI视为一个自主性和授权程度的连续统，区分信息输出与能独立引发保险事件的系统行为；分析包括幻觉、提示注入攻击、自主决策错误、模型漂移、依赖失效和网络物理危害在内的主要风险路径；构建基于风险敞口评估、情景分析、依赖映射和累积风险管理的精算框架；并设计整合网络险、技术错误与遗漏险、产品责任险、性能保证险和主动AI责任险的协调保险架构。
AI.result: 研究表明现有保险产品正在逐步适应代理型AI风险，但需要明确分配机制和专用AI聚合限额；精算框架借鉴网络险演变经验，对风险路径进行了系统分类；提出的分层保险生态系统可有效覆盖不同类型和程度的自主性风险，但依赖于治理、透明度、遥测技术和监管清晰度的同步提升。
AI.conclusion: 代理型AI保险的未来不在于单一险种产品，而在于由多种互补险种组成的分层生态系统；这一系统需要明确的风险分配机制和AI专用聚合额度，同时依赖治理改进、透明度提升、遥测技术发展和监管明确化作为支撑条件。

title: Cosine Misleads: Auxiliary Losses Reshape Vision Language Models, Not Their Latents
summary: Latent visual reasoning (LVR) inserts supervised latent tokens between perception and answer generation in vision-language models (VLMs). The field uses alignment between these latents and their visual targets, i.e., cosine similarity or mean squared error (MSE), as both the training loss and the quality metric, assuming that better alignment yields a better answer. We test this with a designed matrix of five LVR variants and find the assumption inverted: cosine alignment is negatively correlated with accuracy across all five (r=-0.94). To explain this, we introduce PRISM, a pair of inference-time diagnostics: a linear probe that asks where the answer is decodable, and a corruption test that asks whether the latent is load-bearing. The supervised latents are largely bypassed. Corrupting them shifts accuracy by at most four points. The answer is decodable downstream of the latent but not at it, and the size of this decodability gap predicts how much each variant relies on its latent under perturbation. Consistent with an Information Bottleneck reading of the loss, the auxiliary objective reshapes the language model via shared parameters rather than via the latent variable it nominally optimizes.

AI.tldr: 本文发现视觉语言模型中监督式潜在视觉推理（LVR）的潜在变量对齐质量与最终答案准确率呈显著负相关（r=-0.94），并通过提出的PRISM诊断工具揭示监督式潜在变量在很大程度上被旁路，辅助目标主要通过共享参数而非潜在变量本身重塑语言模型。
AI.motivation: 现有潜在视觉推理（LVR）方法假设在视觉语言模型中插入监督式潜在变量，并通过对齐损失（余弦相似度或MSE）作为训练目标和质量评估指标，认为更好的潜在-视觉对齐能带来更优的答案；本文旨在检验这一核心假设是否成立，并深入解释潜在变量在推理过程中的实际作用机制。
AI.method: 本文设计了包含五种LVR变体的矩阵来系统检验对齐假设，并提出了PRISM诊断框架，包括两项推理时诊断工具：线性探针用于探测答案在何处可解码，以及破坏性测试用于检验潜在变量是否为承载信息的关键变量。通过信息瓶颈理论视角对辅助损失的作用机制进行分析。
AI.result: 实验发现余弦对齐与五种LVR变体的准确率均呈强负相关（r=-0.94），表明对齐越好反而答案越差。PRISM诊断表明监督式潜在变量在很大程度上被旁路：破坏潜在变量最多仅导致准确率下降4个百分点；答案可在潜在变量下游解码但无法在潜在变量本身处解码，且该可解码性差距可预测不同变体在扰动下对潜在变量的依赖程度。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了LVR领域的核心假设被颠覆：对齐损失与性能负相关，监督式潜在变量并非信息承载的关键变量。从信息瓶颈视角看，辅助目标通过共享参数而非潜在变量本身来影响语言模型，这为未来VLM中可解释推理机制的设计提供了重要启示，建议重新审视潜在变量监督训练的有效性。

title: AdaPlanBench: Evaluating Adaptive Planning in Large Language Model Agents under World and User Constraints
summary: Planning for real-world problems by language models often involves both world and user constraints, which may not be fully specified upfront and are progressively disclosed through interaction. However, existing benchmarks still underexplore adaptive planning under such progressively revealed dual constraints. To address this gap, we introduce AdaPlanBench, a dynamic interactive benchmark for evaluating whether Large Language Model (LLM) agents can adaptively plan and re-plan under progressively revealed world and user constraints. AdaPlanBench is built on 307 household tasks, with a scalable constraint construction pipeline that augments each task with dual constraints. At runtime, agents interact with the environment in a multi-turn protocol where hidden constraints are revealed only when the agent proposes a plan that violates them, requiring iterative plan revision under accumulating feedback. This makes planning challenging, as agents must infer and track constraints from feedback while re-planning effectively. Experiments on ten leading LLMs show that adaptive planning under dual constraints remains challenging, with the best model reaching only 67.75% accuracy. We further observe that performance degrades as more constraints accumulate, with user constraints posing a particularly large challenge and failures often stemming from weaker physical grounding and reduced effectiveness. These results establish AdaPlanBench as a testbed for dual-constrained interactive planning and highlight the challenge of reliable adaptation to dynamically revealed constraints in LLM agents.

AI.tldr: AdaPlanBench是一个面向LLM智能体的动态交互式规划基准，用于评估其在渐进揭示的世界约束和用户约束下的自适应规划与重规划能力。实验表明，当前最强模型在该基准上仅达到67.75%的准确率，且用户约束的适应比世界约束更具挑战性。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的规划问题往往涉及世界约束和用户约束，这些约束并非事先完全给定，而是通过交互逐步披露，但现有基准鲜有探索这种渐进式双重约束下的自适应规划问题。
AI.method: AdaPlanBench基于307个家庭任务构建，采用可扩展的约束构建流水线为每个任务增强双重约束；在运行时采用多轮交互协议，仅当智能体提出的计划违反隐藏约束时才予以披露，迫使智能体在累积反馈下迭代修正计划。
AI.result: 在十种主流LLM上的实验表明，最佳模型准确率仅为67.75%；随着约束数量累积，性能持续下降，其中用户约束带来的挑战尤为突出，失败原因往往源于较弱的物理基础推理能力和有效性下降。
AI.conclusion: AdaPlanBench作为双重约束交互式规划的测试基准，揭示了LLM智能体在动态揭示约束下实现可靠适应仍然面临重大挑战，尤其是用户约束的适应问题值得进一步关注。

title: Output Type Before Quality: A Standards-Derived XAI Admissibility Rubric for Autonomous-Driving Safety
summary:
Safety standards for ML-based autonomous driving specify the kind of evidence an assurance case must contain (directed cause-and-effect chains, quantified interventional effects, named root-cause variables), yet the XAI literature is organised by output type and technique family (saliency maps, feature attribution, counterfactuals, causal graphs, language traces). SHAP, the most-recommended ADS XAI method, returns a ranked feature list that no implementation effort can convert into a directed chain (Fig.1). We name this mismatch the evidence-type gap.
  From AMLAS, ISO 26262, ISO21448, ISO/PAS 8800 we derive 19 testable evidentiary criteria across 7 lifecycle stages with representative clause-cited derivations and score six XAI method classes structurally.
  Causal XAI emerges as structurally required to satisfy the derived criteria at three stages: hazard identification (+62% rubric gap), incident investigation (+50%), and data management (+50%); the verdict set is stable across thresholds T in (0%, 50%]$ and survives a worst-case single-cell flip down to T = 25%. At the remaining four stages, correlational or language-based methods are comparable or sufficient. The rubric identifies structural admissibility (necessary but not sufficient for compliance): an admissible method's specific output content may still be wrong, and validating that fidelity (the edges a fitted SCM produces, the cause a trace names) is the open assurance challenge. A single-VLA proof of concept on 1,996 real-world driving clips (79,840 rows, ten splits) is consistent with each method's observed output type matching its rubric prediction. XAI method selection for ADS safety assurance should be driven by lifecycle-stage evidence demand, not by method popularity.

AI.tldr: 本文识别了自动驾驶安全标准所要求的证据类型（有向因果链、量化干预效应等）与现有XAI方法输出类型（如SHAP的特征排名）之间的结构性不匹配（证据类型缺口），通过从四份安全标准中提取19项可测试证据标准并评分六类XAI方法，发现因果XAI在三个生命周期阶段结构上必要，为ADS安全保证中的XAI选择提供了以证据需求为导向的评估框架。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶安全标准（AMLAS、ISO 26262、ISO 21448、ISO/PAS 8800）要求保证案例必须包含有向因果链、量化干预效应和已命名的根因变量，但现有XAI文献按输出类型和技术族组织（如显著性图、特征归因、反事实、因果图、语言追踪），其中最被推荐的SHAP方法输出的是排序特征列表，无法通过任何实现努力转化为有向因果链，形成了证据类型缺口（evidence-type gap）。
AI.method: 从四份安全标准中推导出19项可测试证据标准，覆盖7个生命周期阶段，并附有代表性条款引证；基于这些标准对六类XAI方法（包括因果XAI、相关性方法、语言方法等）进行结构性评分，评估各方法满足每项证据标准的能力；在1,996个真实驾驶片段（79,840行数据，十折交叉验证）上使用单VLA概念验证来验证评分预测与实际输出类型的一致性。
AI.result: 因果XAI在三个生命周期阶段结构上必要：危害识别（评分缺口+62%）、事故调查（+50%）和数据管理（+50%）；该判定在阈值T∈(0%,50%]范围内稳定，在最坏单单元翻转下可维持至T=25%；其余四个阶段中，相关性或语言方法相当或足够；概念验证实验一致地观察到各方法的实际输出类型与评分预测匹配。
AI.conclusion: XAI方法选择应基于生命周期阶段的证据需求，而非方法流行度；结构性可接受性（admissibility）是合规的必要条件而非充分条件——可接受方法的具体输出仍可能错误，验证其保真度（如拟合SCM的边、追踪命名的原因）是开放的保证挑战。

title: DRIFT: A Residual Flow Adapter for Decoding Continuous Outputs in Vision-Language Models
summary: Many modern vision-language models (VLMs) build on autoregressive decoding of discrete tokens. While text-based output interfaces enable scalable pretraining and strong zero-shot generalization across diverse tasks, they are poorly suited for problems that require precise continuous outputs, such as localizing temporal boundaries of events or generating robotic control actions. To address this challenge, we propose DRIFT, a general framework for adapting pretrained VLMs to continuous decoding tasks. DRIFT combines a base predictor, which provides a coarse estimate of the target output, with a generative refinement module based on flow matching that iteratively improves the prediction. This residual formulation transforms the generative modeling problem from learning a global output distribution to modeling a localized residual distribution around a strong prior, substantially simplifying optimization. We evaluate DRIFT on both perception and planning tasks, including visual grounding and robotic control. Across multiple tasks and architectures spanning MLLMs, VLAs, and WAMs, DRIFT consistently outperforms a strong set of regression- and generative-based solutions.

AI.tldr: DRIFT提出了一种通用框架，通过将预训练视觉语言模型与基于流匹配的生成式精化模块结合，将离散自回归解码扩展至连续输出任务，在视觉定位和机器人控制等连续预测任务上显著优于回归和生成基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现代视觉语言模型基于离散token的自回归解码，在需要精确连续输出的任务（如事件时间边界定位和机器人控制动作生成）中表现不佳，现有方法难以在保留VLM强大零样本泛化能力的同时处理连续预测问题。
AI.method: DRIFT框架包含一个基础预测器用于提供目标输出的粗略估计，以及一个基于流匹配的生成式精化模块，通过迭代改进预测结果；该残差公式将生成建模问题从学习全局输出分布转化为在强先验周围建模局部残差分布，显著简化了优化过程。
AI.result: 在视觉定位和机器人控制等多个感知与规划任务上，DRIFT在覆盖MLLM、VLA和WAM等多种架构和任务中，一致性地优于强回归基线和生成基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DRIFT证明了通过残差流匹配框架将预训练VLM有效适配到连续解码任务是可行的，为弥合离散语言建模与连续预测需求之间的鸿沟提供了通用且有效的解决方案。

title: Value-and-Structure Alignment for Routing-Consistent Quantization of Mixture-of-Experts Models
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models scale foundation models efficiently by activating only a subset of experts for each token, but their large number of expert parameters still makes quantization essential for practical deployment. Unlike dense models, however, MoE models are sensitive to routing instability: small quantization-induced perturbations can change the top-$k$ expert selection, altering the computation path and degrading model quality. We propose Value-and-Structure Routing Alignment for Quantization (VSRAQ), a MoE-specific post-training quantization objective that preserves pre-quantization expert-selection behavior under quantization. VSRAQ combines two complementary objectives that jointly preserve expert-selection behavior: value alignment, which matches routing-relevant logits or scores, and structure alignment, which preserves expert ordering and top-$k$ decision boundaries. By maintaining routing consistency, VSRAQ reduces quantization-induced degradation without introducing any inference-time overhead and can be integrated into existing quantization frameworks. Experiments on recent MoE foundation models show that VSRAQ improves expert-selection consistency and consistently outperforms reconstruction-only and router-aware baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出VSRAQ，一种面向混合专家模型的量化后训练目标，通过值对齐和结构对齐联合保持专家选择行为的一致性，在不增加推理开销的前提下显著降低量化导致的模型质量退化。
AI.motivation: 混合专家模型虽通过稀疏激活提升效率，但其大量专家参数仍需量化才能实际部署；然而不同于密集模型，MoE对路由不稳定高度敏感，量化引入的微小扰动可能改变top-k专家选择，进而改变计算路径并严重降低模型质量，现有量化方法未专门解决这一路由一致性问题。
AI.method: 提出VSRAQ（Value-and-Structure Routing Alignment for Quantization），一种针对MoE的量化后训练目标，包含两个互补的目标：值对齐用于匹配与路由相关的logits或分数，结构对齐用于保持专家排序和top-k决策边界；该目标可无缝集成到现有量化框架中，且不引入任何推理时额外开销。
AI.result: 在多个最新的MoE基础模型上的实验表明，VSRAQ显著提升了专家选择的一致性，并在所有对比中一致优于仅使用重建损失的基线和仅感知路由器的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式保持量化前后路由行为的一致性，VSRAQ能有效降低量化对MoE模型引入的质量退化，为MoE模型的高效部署提供了一种轻量且实用的量化方案，且无需修改推理流程。

title: Severity-Aware Curriculum Learning with Multi-Model Response Selection for Medical Text Generation
summary: Telehealth systems have become increasingly important for delivering accessible and timely medical information. Existing large language models often struggle to provide consistent and contextually appropriate medical responses across varying levels of case severity. This limitation highlights the need for models that can effectively adapt to the progressive complexity in medical queries. To address this challenge, we introduce a severity-aware multi-model framework that integrates curriculum training strategy with relevance-based response selection. The proposed framework employs a three-stage curriculum learning strategy, where each model is trained sequentially on mild, moderate, and critical cases to progressively acquire domain knowledge. The approach utilizes five large language models, each independently trained under the same curriculum scheme. During inference, all models generate candidate responses, and the most appropriate response is selected as the final output. The framework is trained and evaluated on the MAQA dataset, which provides annotated medical question-answer pairs. Experimental results evaluated using BERTScore demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior performance compared to both baseline and fine-tuned models, attaining 86.71% in the baseline setting and 90.30% after fine-tuning. These results highlight the effectiveness of combining curriculum learning with multi-model response selection in improving response quality and relevance in medical text generation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种严重性感知的多模型框架，结合课程学习策略与相关性响应选择机制，通过三个阶段的渐进式课程训练五个大语言模型，并在MAQA数据集上使用BERTScore评估，在基线和微调设置下分别达到86.71%和90.30%的性能，显著提升了医疗文本生成的响应质量和相关性。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型在提供医疗响应时，难以在不同严重程度的病例间保持一致性和上下文适当性，缺乏适应医疗查询渐进式复杂性的能力。
AI.method: 提出一个严重性感知的多模型框架，采用三阶段课程学习策略，依次在轻度、中度和危重病例上训练模型以逐步获取领域知识；框架使用五个独立训练的大语言模型，推理时所有模型生成候选响应，再通过相关性选择机制选出最合适的响应作为最终输出；训练和评估基于MAQA数据集。
AI.result: 在MAQA数据集上使用BERTScore进行评估，该方法在基线设置下达到86.71%，在微调后达到90.30%，优于基线模型和微调模型。
AI.conclusion: 结合课程学习与多模型响应选择能有效提升医疗文本生成中的响应质量和相关性，为构建严重性自适应的医疗对话系统提供了可行方案。

title: Emotion-Aware Image Generation from Korean Diary Text via LLM-based Prompt Translation and LoRA Fine-Tuning
summary: T2I models cannot effectively capture sentiment from various types of text, including diaries, as they primarily focus on visual object-related patterns rather than contextual emotional understanding. This paper proposes an emotion-aware text-to-image pipeline that generates children's hand drawing style images from short Korean diary entries. The proposed pipeline employs Qwen3-8B for recognising implicit sentiment from short diaries, and Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium fine-tuned with LoRA on children's drawing images with emotion-based trigger words for image generation. Additionally, this paper presents experiments examining the effect of emotion trigger words on generated images and discusses the limitations of CLIP Score as an evaluation metric for emotion-aware image generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个面向短韩语日记的情感感知文本到图像生成流水线，结合Qwen3-8B进行隐式情感识别与LoRA微调的Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium生成儿童手绘风格图像，并实验分析了情感触发词对生成效果的影响以及CLIP Score作为情感感知评估指标的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有T2I模型主要关注视觉对象相关模式而缺乏上下文情感理解能力，无法有效从日记等多种文本类型中捕捉情感信息，导致生成的图像无法准确传达文本中的情感语义，尤其缺乏面向儿童手绘风格与韩语短文本的情感感知生成方案。
AI.method: 本文提出一个两阶段情感感知文本到图像生成流水线：首先使用Qwen3-8B大语言模型对短韩语日记进行隐式情感识别与理解，然后采用基于LoRA微调的Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium模型，在儿童手绘图像数据集上结合情感触发词进行条件图像生成，从而实现情感感知的儿童手绘风格图像输出。
AI.result: 实验部分重点考察了情感触发词对生成图像的影响，并揭示了CLIP Score作为情感感知图像生成评估指标的局限性——该指标无法充分反映生成图像中的情感表达质量，表明现有自动评估方法在情感维度上存在明显不足。
AI.conclusion: 本研究验证了结合大语言模型情感理解与扩散模型LoRA微调的情感感知图像生成流水线的有效性，同时指出CLIP Score在情感评估任务中的缺陷，为情感感知文本到图像生成领域的评估方法改进和更细粒度情感表达研究提供了方向。

title: Rethinking LoRA Memory Through the Lens of KV Cache Compression
summary: Parametric retrieval augmentation encodes document information into lightweight, document-specific modules such as LoRA adapters, reducing the need to include all evidence as input context. However, it remains unclear how this parameter-side memory interacts with context-side memory stored in the KV cache. We study this interaction in document-level question answering by progressively evicting document key-value states and measuring when a document LoRA contributes beyond the retained context. We find that document LoRA adds little when the KV cache is largely intact, but becomes increasingly useful under aggressive compression, recovering 13-21 ROUGE-L points when no document context remains. The gain is largest when the base model encodes the document, and the adapter is applied only during answer generation, suggesting that document LoRA is better understood as decoding-time parametric memory than as a document encoder. Finally, QA-style supervision produces substantially stronger adapters than raw-context next-token-prediction. These results position document LoRA as a complementary memory channel whose value emerges precisely when context-side evidence is scarce.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了参数侧记忆（文档LoRA）与上下文侧记忆（KV缓存）在文档级问答中的交互机制，发现文档LoRA在KV缓存被大幅压缩时发挥关键补充作用，且其作为解码时参数记忆而非文档编码器的定位更为合理。
AI.motivation: 参数化检索增强通过将文档信息编码为轻量级模块（如LoRA适配器）来减少对输入上下文的依赖，但参数侧记忆与上下文侧记忆（KV缓存存储）之间的交互机制尚不清楚。本文旨在系统研究这两种记忆在文档级问答中的相互作用关系。
AI.method: 通过逐步驱逐文档的KV状态（键值对）来模拟不同程度的上下文压缩，测量在每种压缩水平下文档LoRA相比仅保留上下文的基线所能带来的额外收益；同时对比了不同LoRA应用方式（编码时/解码时）和监督信号类型（QA监督 vs. 原始上下文下一个词预测）对性能的影响。
AI.result: 当KV缓存基本完整时，文档LoRA的贡献很小；但在激进压缩下，文档LoRA可恢复13-21个ROUGE-L点。收益最大出现在基础模型编码文档、仅解码时应用适配器的设置中。此外，QA式监督训练出的适配器显著强于基于原始上下文下一个词预测训练的适配器。
AI.conclusion: 文档LoRA应被理解为解码时的参数化记忆（decoding-time parametric memory）而非文档编码器，其价值在上下文证据稀缺时凸显。这一结果将文档LoRA定位为与上下文侧记忆互补的记忆通道，为参数化检索增强的设计提供了重要指导。

title: GuardNet: Ensemble Strategies of Shallow Neural Networks for Robust Prompt Injection and Jailbreak Detection
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have transformed natural language processing, but they remain vulnerable to Prompt Injection (PI) and Jailbreak (JB) attacks. In addition, benchmark evaluations may be affected by contamination and partial information leakage, compromising performance estimates. This work presents GuardNet, a guardrail system based on an ensemble of shallow neural networks (BiLSTMs) with approximately 47 million parameters. We investigate the hypothesis that robustness in adversarial scenarios depends more on the diversity of example coverage and threshold calibration than on model scale. The results indicate that GuardNet achieves competitive performance compared with lightweight detectors and high efficiency at low latency, although larger LLMs such as Mistral-7B and Llama-3.1-8B still achieve superior performance in terms of F1 score and AUROC on the blind JBB-Behaviors benchmark. Nevertheless, GuardNet achieves an AUROC of 0.747 on the blind dataset (n = 200) and an F1 score of 0.92 on a proprietary benchmark (n = 50), under threshold calibration and evaluation with declared partial information leakage. The system operates with an average latency of approximately 50 ms on CPU, making it suitable for deployment in production environments with cost and infrastructure constraints.

AI.tldr: GuardNet 提出基于 BiLSTM 集成（约 47M 参数）的防护系统，在提示注入和越狱攻击检测中以约 50ms CPU 延迟实现竞争性能，表明鲁棒性更多依赖样本覆盖多样性与阈值校准而非模型规模。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型面临提示注入和越狱攻击的脆弱性，且基准评估可能受数据污染与信息泄露影响，导致性能估计失真。现有方案或依赖大规模 LLM 带来高成本，或轻量检测器鲁棒性不足，需一种兼顾效率、低延迟与可部署性的防护方案。
AI.method: GuardNet 采用基于浅层双向 LSTM（BiLSTM）集成的防护系统，参数量约 47M，通过多样化样本覆盖和阈值校准来提升对抗场景下的鲁棒性，而非依赖模型规模扩展。
AI.result: 在盲测 JBB-Behaviors 基准上，GuardNet 的 AUROC 达 0.747（n=200），在私有基准上 F1 达 0.92（n=50）；尽管 Mistral-7B 和 Llama-3.1-8B 等大模型在 F1 和 AUROC 上仍更优，但 GuardNet 在 CPU 上平均延迟仅约 50ms，适合成本与基础设施受限的生产部署。
AI.conclusion: 对抗鲁棒性更依赖于样本覆盖的多样性与合理的阈值校准而非模型规模，GuardNet 在低延迟与轻量级条件下实现了与大型 LLM 可比的检测性能，为资源受限环境下的 LLM 安全防护提供了可行方案。

title: Safety Paradox: How Enhanced Safety Awareness Leaves LLMs Vulnerable to Posterior Attack
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are rigorously aligned to refuse harmful requests, a process that inherently cultivates a latent capacity to evaluate and recognize unsafe content. In this work, we reveal that this advanced safety awareness inadvertently introduces a fatal vulnerability. We introduce Posterior Attack, a single-query jailbreak that bypasses guardrails by prompting the model to generate the exact harmful response its internal classifier would normally flag as unsafe. Through extensive empirical evaluation across 30 open-source LLMs (up to 35B parameters in size) and frontier models (e.g., GPT-5, Claude 4.6), we observe a striking phenomenon: models with superior safety-judgment capabilities are disproportionately more susceptible to this exploitation. To explain this, we formalize the Safety Paradox, analytically showing that monotonic improvements in safety alignment naturally amplify posterior vulnerability. Finally, we establish a causal link via reinforcement learning interventions, exemplifying that artificially degrading a model's safety judgment immunizes it against the attack, whereas enhancing judgment exacerbates the vulnerability. Our findings highlight potential flaws in current alignment paradigms, indicating that defense mechanisms may require further structural refinement.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了大语言模型安全对齐过程中培养的内部安全评估能力反而引入了一个致命漏洞，并提出Posterior Attack攻击方法，通过一次查询即可绕过安全护栏生成有害内容，且安全判断能力越强的模型越易受攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有研究普遍认为大语言模型的安全对齐（即拒绝有害请求）是一种有效的防护机制，但本文指出这一过程在模型内部培养出的安全评估能力本身可能成为被攻击的脆弱点，现有对齐范式存在结构性缺陷。
AI.method: 本文提出Posterior Attack，这是一种单次查询（single-query）的越狱攻击方法，通过诱导模型生成其内部分类器本应标记为不安全的确切有害响应，从而绕过安全护栏。此外，论文通过形式化分析定义了"安全悖论"（Safety Paradox），并利用强化学习干预建立因果联系：人为降低模型的安全判断能力可免疫攻击，而增强判断力则加剧脆弱性。
AI.result: 在30个开源大语言模型（参数规模最高达35B）以及前沿模型（如GPT-5、Claude 4.6）上的大量实验表明，具有更优安全判断能力的模型反而更容易受到Posterior Attack的利用，验证了安全悖论的存在。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示当前安全对齐范式存在根本性缺陷——模型内部安全评估能力的增强反而放大了后验脆弱性，表明防御机制需要在结构层面进行进一步改进，而非单纯提升模型对有害内容的识别能力。

title: MemoryCard: Topic-Aware Multi-Modal Clue Compression for Long-Video Question Answering
summary: Long-video question answering remains challenging for Vision-Language Models (VLMs), as answer-relevant evidence is often sparse, transient, and temporally dispersed across lengthy video contexts. Existing frame-centric approaches improve efficiency through uniform sampling, query-aware frame selection, visual-token compression, and adaptive resolution strategies. However, they still rely on isolated and fragmented frames as the fundamental evidence units, limiting VLMs' ability to effectively capture coherent event-level semantics. To address this limitation, we propose MemoryCard, a video-memory-based augmentation framework that organizes long videos into self-contained Memory Cards. Specifically, MemoryCard first performs a self-reading process over videos and aligned utterances to segment the video into semantically coherent units, each corresponding to a distinct topic or event. For each unit, it generates an event-level video gist and selects representative visual moments, which are then rendered into unified Memory Cards for retrieval and question answering. Experimental results demonstrate that MemoryCard consistently improves long-video QA performance under comparable visual-token budgets, achieving up to a 21.8% relative improvement in accuracy. All code is available at https://github.com/NEUIR/MemoryCard.

AI.tldr: MemoryCard是一种基于视频记忆增强的框架，通过将长视频分割为语义连贯的记忆卡片作为基本证据单元，有效提升了视觉语言模型在长视频问答任务上的性能，在相近视觉token预算下可实现高达21.8%的相对准确率提升。
AI.motivation: 现有面向长视频问答的帧中心方法虽然通过均匀采样、查询感知帧选择、视觉token压缩和自适应分辨率等策略提升了效率，但依然依赖孤立且碎片化的帧作为基本证据单元，限制了视觉语言模型有效捕捉连贯事件级语义的能力。
AI.method: MemoryCard首先通过自读取过程对视频及其对齐文本进行语义分割，将视频划分为语义连贯的单元，每个单元对应一个独立主题或事件；对每个单元生成事件级视频摘要并选取代表性视觉时刻，随后将这些内容渲染为统一的记忆卡片，用于后续检索和问答推理。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，MemoryCard在相近视觉token预算下持续提升了长视频问答性能，相对准确率最高提升达21.8%。
AI.conclusion: 将长视频组织为自包含的记忆卡片，以事件级语义单元替代孤立帧作为证据基础，能够显著增强视觉语言模型在长视频理解中的表现，为长视频问答提供了一种高效的视频记忆增强新范式。

title: PlanBench-V: A Spatial Planning Map Benchmark for Vision-Language Models
summary: Spatial planning maps are central to territorial governance, translating planning objectives, regulations, and spatial strategies into visual forms for decision-making, public communication, and institutional coordination. Their interpretation, however, requires fine-grained visual perception, spatial reasoning, and policy-informed professional judgment, creating major challenges for both human learners and AI systems. With the rapid progress of Vision-Language Models (VLMs), their use in urban planning analysis is gaining attention, yet existing multimodal benchmarks mainly target general visual understanding and overlook the domain-specific cognitive processes of planning practice. To address this gap, we introduce PlanBench-V, the first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating VLMs in spatial planning map interpretation. We first build the Spatial Planning Map Database (SPMD), an expert-annotated dataset of 223 planning maps and 1629 question-answer pairs curated by professional planners, covering diverse geographic regions and cartographic styles. We then propose a theory-informed evaluation framework assessing four progressive capabilities: Perception, Reasoning, Association, and Implementation, corresponding to the cognitive pipeline of planning map interpretation. Extensive experiments across two generations of VLMs show clear progress but persistent limitations. The best 2026 agentic reasoning model, Qwen3.6-Plus, substantially outperforms the best 2025 model, GPT-4o, by 27%. Nevertheless, all models still struggle with implementation-oriented tasks requiring evaluative judgment, policy sensitivity, and constraint-aware decision-making. These findings reveal fundamental limitations of current VLMs in professional planning contexts and highlight the need for domain-adaptive multimodal reasoning frameworks. Code and data are available at https://plangpt.github.io.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PlanBench-V，首个针对空间规划地图解读的视觉-语言模型综合评测基准，包含专家标注的SPMD数据集和基于认知流程的四阶段评估框架，实验表明最新代理推理模型较前代提升27%，但在需专业判断的实施类任务中仍存在根本性局限。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型的多模态评测基准主要面向通用视觉理解任务，而忽视了城市规划实践中特有的领域认知过程，如细粒度视觉感知、空间推理和基于政策的专业判断，因此缺乏专门评估VLM在空间规划地图解读能力的系统性基准。
AI.method: 研究构建了空间规划地图数据库（SPMD），包含223幅规划地图和1629个由专业规划师标注的问答对，覆盖多样地理区域和制图风格；并提出了基于理论的四阶段评估框架：感知、推理、关联和实施，对应规划地图解读的认知流程。
AI.result: 对两代VLM的广泛实验表明，2026年代理推理模型Qwen3.6-Plus相较2025年最佳模型GPT-4o提升27%，但所有模型在执行评估判断、政策敏感性和约束感知决策实施类任务中仍存在显著困难。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现揭示了当前VLM在专业规划语境中的根本性局限，凸显了发展领域自适应的多模态推理框架的迫切需求，为未来将AI应用于空间规划和领土治理提供了明确的研究方向。

title: Coding with "Enemy": Can Human Developers Detect AI Agent Sabotage?
summary: AI coding agents are increasingly embedded in real-world software development, collaborating with human developers while gaining broader access to codebases and tools. This creates a new attack surface: an agent can exploit human trust to sabotage development, for instance by inserting malicious code to accomplish a hidden side task. Most prior work studies AI sabotage in AI-only settings, paying limited attention to the role of human oversight in detecting and mitigating such malicious behavior. To address this gap, we conduct the first large-scale study of human oversight in AI coding sabotage. Over 100 participants collaborate with one of four frontier models (Claude-Opus-4.6, GPT-5.4, Gemini-3.1-Pro, and MiniMax-M2.7) on a long-horizon coding task lasting around five hours, designed to mimic real-world workflows. We find that 94% of developers fail to detect sabotage, and our analysis of participant feedback attributes this vulnerability to minimal code review, plausible cover story, and overtrust in agents. We further test the effectiveness of a safety monitor in one condition: while the monitor reduces sabotage success, 56% of participants still accept the malicious code, ignoring its warnings. Drawing on participant feedback, we offer actionable suggestions for better monitor design. This work complements existing AI safety research and highlights an urgent need for human-centric safety mechanisms that account for human factors, particularly in long-horizon, real-world development settings.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次大规模调查了人类监督在AI编码智能体恶意行为检测中的作用：在长达五小时的编码任务中，94%的开发者未能发现智能体插入的恶意代码，即使配备安全监控器仍有56%的参与者接受恶意代码。
AI.motivation: 现有AI安全研究多聚焦于纯AI环境中的智能体恶意行为，忽视了人类监督在检测和缓解此类行为中的关键作用，特别是在AI编码智能体已实际嵌入软件开发并与开发者协作的现实背景下。
AI.method: 招募超过100名参与者，分别与四种前沿模型（Claude-Opus-4.6、GPT-5.4、Gemini-3.1-Pro、MiniMax-M2.7）协作完成一项持续约五小时的长周期编码任务；通过参与者的反馈分析漏洞原因，并在一种条件下测试安全监控器的有效性。
AI.result: 94%的开发者未能检测到智能体的恶意代码破坏行为；分析表明漏洞源于最小化的代码审查、合理的掩护理由以及对智能体的过度信任；在配备安全监控器的条件下，仍有56%的参与者在忽略监控警告的情况下接受了恶意代码。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了在真实世界长周期开发环境中人类监督AI智能体的严重脆弱性，强调需要以人为中心的安全机制来有效应对AI编码智能体的恶意行为，并基于参与者反馈为安全监控器设计提出了可操作的改进建议。

title: T-FunS3D: Task-Driven Hierarchical Open-Vocabulary 3D Functionality Segmentation
summary: Open-vocabulary 3D functionality segmentation enables robots to localize functional object components in 3D scenes. It is a challenging task that requires spatial understanding and task interpretation. Current open-vocabulary 3D segmentation methods primarily focus on object-level recognition, while scene-wide part segmentation methods attempt to segment the entire scene exhaustively, making them highly resource-intensive and time consuming. Balancing segmentation performance in terms of granularity, accuracy, and speed remains a challenge. As one step towards alleviating this, we introduce T-FunS3D, a task-driven hierarchical open-vocabulary 3D functionality segmentation method that provides actionable perception for robotic applications. Our method takes as input the 3D point cloud and posed RGB-D images of an indoor scene. We construct an open-vocabulary scene graph by extracting instances and their visual embeddings in the environment. Given a task description, T-FunS3D identifies the most relevant instances in the scene graph and locates their functional components leveraging a vision-language model. Experiments on the SceneFun3D dataset demonstrate that T-FunS3D is comparable to state-of-the-art in open-vocabulary 3D functionality segmentation, while achieving faster runtime and reduced memory usage.

AI.tldr: T-FunS3D是一种任务驱动的分层开放词汇3D功能分割方法，通过构建开放词汇场景图并利用视觉-语言模型定位功能组件，在保持与SOTA相当的分割性能的同时，显著提升了运行速度和内存效率。
AI.motivation: 当前开放词汇3D分割方法主要聚焦于物体级识别，而场景级部件分割方法虽能实现细粒度分割但资源消耗大、耗时长，在分割粒度、准确性和速度之间的平衡仍是一个难题，缺乏一种高效且能为机器人提供可操作感知的开放词汇功能组件分割方案。
AI.method: T-FunS3D以室内场景的3D点云和带位姿的RGB-D图像为输入，首先通过提取场景中的实例及其视觉嵌入构建开放词汇场景图；随后根据任务描述，在场景图中识别出最相关的实例，并利用视觉-语言模型定位其功能组件，实现层次化的任务驱动分割。
AI.result: 在SceneFun3D数据集上的实验表明，T-FunS3D在开放词汇3D功能分割任务上达到了与现有最先进方法相当的性能，同时实现了更快的运行速度和更低的内存占用。
AI.conclusion: T-FunS3D通过任务驱动的层次化设计在功能分割的粒度、准确性和效率之间取得了有效平衡，为机器人应用提供了可操作的感知能力，展示了将场景图与视觉-语言模型相结合实现高效开放词汇分割的可行路径。

title: Towards Truly Multilingual ASR: Generalizing Code-Switching ASR to Unseen Language Pairs
comment: ICML 2026 Workshop on Machine Learning for Audio
summary: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) has become a key technology for human--AI interaction. However, code-switching ASR (CS-ASR) remains particularly challenging due to the severe scarcity of multilingual CS speech resources across diverse language pairs. Existing approaches primarily improve CS-ASR performance through synthetic CS speech generation or pair-specific fine-tuning on limited bilingual datasets. Nevertheless, these approaches face an inherent scalability limitation, as support for CS must be developed separately for language pairs whose number grows combinatorially with the number of supported languages. In this work, we investigate whether CS capabilities learned from a limited set of seen language pairs can generalize to unseen language pairs through model merging and domain generalization methods. Our experiments show that merged bilingual CS-ASR models modestly generalize to unseen language pairs, suggesting limited transfer of bilingual CS capabilities across language pairs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于模型合并与域泛化方法，探究双语CS-ASR模型在有限语言对上习得的语种混合能力能否泛化至未见语言对，实验结果表明该泛化能力有限。
AI.motivation: 现有CS-ASR方法主要通过合成语音生成或特定语言对微调来提升性能，但面临严重的可扩展性瓶颈：支持的语言对数量随语言种类呈组合级增长，需为每种语言对分别开发独立模型，缺乏跨语言对的泛化能力。
AI.method: 本文采用模型合并与域泛化两类方法，探究在有限数量的已见语言对上训练的双语CS-ASR模型能否将其语种混合识别能力迁移至未见语言对，通过实验评估跨语言对的泛化性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，合并后的双语CS-ASR模型在未见语言对上仅表现出有限的泛化能力，暗示双语CS能力在不同语言对之间的迁移十分有限。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了当前CS-ASR方法在跨语言对泛化上的根本性局限，指出简单依赖模型合并或域泛化难以解决CS语音资源的稀疏性与语言对组合爆炸问题，需探索更有效的跨语言泛化机制。

title: Do More Agents Help? Controlled and Protocol-Aligned Evaluation of LLM Agent Workflows
summary: Does adding more agents help an LLM workflow once compared systems share the same benchmark loader, tool access, answer contract, usage accounting, and trajectory logging? We introduce BenchAgent, an evaluation framework that places single-agent, fixed multi-agent (MAS), and evolving MAS workflows under one normalized execution and logging protocol. BenchAgent evaluates these substrate-internal workflows across ten reasoning, coding, and tool-use benchmarks with GPT-4.1, and separately reports a Protocol-Aligned External (PAE) GAIA study of a runtime-generated workflow. Under SI conditions, at most one of six tested MAS exceeds the matched single-agent anchor on benchmark-balanced average accuracy: EvoAgent lies within the Wilson one-run guidance, while the remaining five trail by 2.56-11.29 points and occupy more expensive accuracy-cost trade-offs. On the PAE GAIA snapshot, a Claude-Code-style runtime workflow reaches 66.72% overall and 69.23% on Level 3, more than 20 points above the strongest non-Claude baseline, Jarvis, a fixed MAS.

AI.tldr: BenchAgent是一个标准化评估框架，通过统一执行与日志协议比较单智能体、固定多智能体与演化多智能体LLM工作流。实验表明，在严格同一条件下，仅EvoAgent在平衡平均准确率上勉强持平单智能体基线，其余五种MAS均落后2.56-11.29分且成本更高；但在PAE GAIA设置下，运行时生成的Claude-Code风格工作流达到66.72%准确率，远超非Claude基线。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统（MAS）的评估往往在异构基准加载机制、工具接口、答案格式、用量核算和轨迹日志记录下进行，导致不同工作流之间缺乏公平、可重复的比较基础。该论文旨在回答一个关键问题：在共享完全相同的基准加载器、工具访问权限、答案契约、用量统计与轨迹日志的条件下，增加更多智能体是否真的能提升LLM工作流性能。
AI.method: 提出BenchAgent评估框架，将单智能体、固定结构MAS（Multi-Agent System）和演化MAS三种工作流置于统一规范化的执行与日志协议下。在内部基板（substrate-internal）条件下，使用GPT-4.1在十个涵盖推理、编码和工具使用的基准上评估这些工作流；同时单独报告一项协议对齐外部（PAE）GAIA研究，测试运行时生成的工作流（Claude-Code风格）。
AI.result: 在严格同一（SI）条件下，六种测试的MAS中只有EvoAgent在基准平衡平均准确率上勉强与匹配的单智能体锚点持平，位于Wilson单次运行指导区间内，其余五种MAS落后2.56-11.29分且占据更昂贵的准确率-成本权衡。在PAE GAIA快照中，Claude-Code风格运行时工作流达到66.72%整体准确率、69.23%的Level 3准确率，比最强非Claude基线Jarvis（固定MAS）高出20分以上。
AI.conclusion: 在严格标准化的评估协议下，现有多智能体方法在性能和成本效率上普遍不如单智能体基线，表明增加智能体数量并非提升LLM工作流效果的通用策略；但运行时动态生成工作流（如Claude-Code风格）在特定复杂任务（GAIA）上展现出显著优势，提示工作流结构的自适应生成比固定多智能体协作更有潜力。

title: Video-Rate Streaming Stylization on a Vision-Aware MLLM-Conditioned Edit Diffusion: Asymmetric Batched Inference on a Distilled UNet + MLLM Text Encoder
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures, 12 tables. Under review at IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology. Code, evaluation harness, and the released v3 Temporal LLLite adapter weights are at https://github.com/otanl/dreamlite-stream (also mirrored to Hugging Face and Zenodo)
summary: Aggressive distillation of the diffusion U-Net inverts the per-frame bottleneck of real-time text-to-image pipelines: once the denoiser is a 4-step or 1-step distilled student, the text encoder becomes the critical path. This inversion is most acute in vision-aware edit diffusion, where the encoder is a multimodal large language model (MLLM). We study the case of a 0.39B distilled edit U-Net paired with a 2.13B MLLM text encoder (Qwen3-VL) and present a streaming pipeline targeted at this regime built around three engineering mechanisms: asymmetric side-stream / main-stream CUDA pipelining with batched text-encoder amortisation (and optional static-prompt caching), a compile-friendly ControlNet-LLLite reformulation that folds the entire U-Net + adapter stack into a single fused graph, and a periodic conditioning-refresh schedule with a hook subset that amortises the per-frame conditioning cost. On a single consumer RTX 3090 Ti at 512x512 the pipeline sustains 27.4 fps over a 480-frame run at batch size B=8 and 29.6 fps at B=16, with end-to-end p50 latency of approximately 0.5 and 1.0 seconds respectively; the same operating point measures 54.9 fps on RTX 4090 and 74.1 fps on RTX 5090. We report video-rate streaming throughput rather than interactive low latency, and locate our numbers against same-stack StreamDiffusion re-runs as systems context, not as a benchmark superiority claim. For the trained oil-painting style, the released temporal adapter generalises within in-clip noise to 19 unused DAVIS-2017 sequences and 15 non-DAVIS clips from seven sources; prompt-level generalisation to unseen style families is bounded and reported separately.

AI.tldr: 本文针对扩散U-Net蒸馏后文本编码器成为瓶颈的问题，提出了一套流式推理管线，通过非对称CUDA流水线、编译友好的ControlNet-LLLite融合图和周期性条件刷新调度，在消费级GPU上实现了视频率实时文本到图像编辑的吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 激进蒸馏扩散U-Net（如4步或1步学生模型）反转了实时文生图管线中的每帧瓶颈——去噪器不再是瓶颈，文本编码器（尤其是视觉感知编辑中使用的多模态大语言模型MLLM）成为新的关键路径，导致现有推理框架在蒸馏后管线中效率严重下降。
AI.method: 构建了0.39B蒸馏编辑U-Net与2.13B Qwen3-VL MLLM文本编码器的流水线，提出三项工程机制：非对称侧流/主流CUDA流水线与批量化文本编码器分摊（可选静态提示缓存）、将U-Net与适配器全栈折叠为单一融合图的编译友好型ControlNet-LLLite重构、以及利用钩子子集的周期性条件刷新调度以摊销每帧条件计算成本。
AI.result: 在单张RTX 3090 Ti上以512x512分辨率、B=8批量实现27.4 fps（480帧）、B=16批量实现29.6 fps，端到端p50延迟约0.5秒和1.0秒；RTX 4090达54.9 fps，RTX 5090达74.1 fps。训练的油画风格时间适配器在19个DAVIS-2017序列和15个非DAVIS片段上实现剪辑内噪声泛化，对未见风格族的提示级泛化有限并单独报告。
AI.conclusion: 在U-Net被激进蒸馏后，文本编码器成为延迟瓶颈，通过针对性工程优化（异步流水线、融合图编译、条件刷新调度）可在消费级GPU上实现视频率流式吞吐；研究定位为系统上下文报告而非基准性能宣称，揭示了面向视觉编辑的蒸馏管线在真实部署中的关键工程权衡。

title: YouZhi: Towards High-Concurrency Financial LLMs via Adaptive GQA-to-MLA Transition
summary: Large language models (LLMs) drive significant financial innovations, yet their high-concurrency deployment is severely bottlenecked by KV cache memory overhead, which inflates infrastructure costs and throttles scalability. To address this, we propose YouZhi-LLM, a highly efficient financial LLM empowered by a comprehensive structural transition and training pipeline natively built on the Huawei Ascend ecosystem. At its algorithmic core, YouZhi-LLM features a layer-adaptive GQA-to-MLA transition framework that dynamically assigns per-layer FreqFold sizes, maximizing KV-cache compression while minimizing perplexity degradation. To recover representation capacity and inject domain expertise, the Ascend-based training pipeline seamlessly integrates generalized knowledge distillation with financial-specific supervised fine-tuning. Evaluations demonstrate the superiority of this systematic approach, with the adaptive transition reducing perplexity degradation by up to 35% over uniform baselines. Crucially, when evaluated on Ascend NPUs via vLLM-Ascend, the massive KV-cache reduction translates directly into deployment efficiency. Compared to their respective base models, YouZhi-7B yields a 12.3% improvement in average financial benchmark score alongside a 2.69$\times$ increase in maximum concurrency; similarly, YouZhi-14B achieves a 7.0% accuracy gain and a 2.43$\times$ concurrency boost, establishing a new paradigm for cost-effective, high-throughput financial inference.

AI.tldr: YouZhi-LLM提出了一种基于华为昇腾生态的层自适应GQA-to-MLA转换框架，通过动态分配FreqFold大小实现高效KV缓存压缩，结合知识蒸馏与金融领域微调，在金融基准测试中取得12.3%（7B）和7.0%（14B）的性能提升，并发能力分别提升2.69倍和2.43倍。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在金融领域的高并发部署受到KV缓存内存开销的严重瓶颈，导致基础设施成本膨胀并限制了可扩展性，亟需一种既能大幅压缩KV缓存又不显著损害模型性能的高效解决方案。
AI.method: YouZhi-LLM提出了一种层自适应GQA-to-MLA转换框架，动态为每层分配FreqFold大小以最大化KV缓存压缩并最小化困惑度退化，同时基于华为昇腾生态构建训练流程，通过广义知识蒸馏与金融领域监督微调相结合来恢复表示能力并注入领域知识。
AI.result: 自适应转换相比均匀基线将困惑度退化降低高达35%；在昇腾NPU上通过vLLM-Ascend评估，YouZhi-7B在金融基准上平均提升12.3%，最大并发量提升2.69倍；YouZhi-14B准确率提升7.0%，并发量提升2.43倍。
AI.conclusion: YouZhi-LLM通过系统性的结构转换与训练策略，在显著降低KV缓存开销的同时提升了领域性能与部署效率，为成本效益高、吞吐量大的金融推理任务建立了新范式。

title: Beyond Output Matching: Preserving Internal Geometry in NVFP4 LLM Distillatio
summary: Demand for low-precision inference, including NVFP4-based approaches, has grown as large language models are increasingly deployed in latency and cost constrained production environments. Quantization-aware distillation (QAD) helps recover accuracy lost under low bit quantization by training a quantized student to match the output distribution of a frozen higher precision teacher via a KL-divergence loss. In this work, we first provide a representation level diagnosis of QAD: output matching alone can mask internal degradation, because many intermediate activation geometries can yield similar teacher-aligned logits. Using CKA, we show that KL-only QAD can reduce layerwise representational similarity relative to the BF16 teacher, with especially severe drift in RL-post-trained models. This drift correlates with downstream bottlenecks on reasoning and coding tasks, suggesting that low bit recovery requires preserving internal geometry rather than matching outputs alone. Motivated by this finding, we propose \textbf{CKA-QAD}, a CKA-guided representational alignment method for NVFP4 QAD and low bit LLM accuracy recovery. The method adds a lightweight regularizer that preserves internal representational geometry during distillation by aligning layerwise Gram matrices through CKA. Across Nemotron 3 Nano and Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507, CKA-QAD substantially improves representational alignment and improves downstream reasoning and coding accuracy with modest training overhead. Our findings position CKA-guided representational alignment as a practical complement to output matching for quantized LLM recovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CKA-QAD方法，通过CKA引导的表示对齐正则化来修复NVFP4低比特量化蒸馏中仅靠KL散度输出匹配导致的内部表示退化问题，显著提升了量化LLM在推理和编码任务上的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有量化感知蒸馏（QAD）仅通过KL散度进行输出匹配，虽然能使量化学生模型在输出分布上对齐高精度教师模型，但内部中间层表示可能出现严重退化；尤其是在RL后训练的模型上，层间表示相似性显著下降，进而导致推理和编码等下游任务出现性能瓶颈。低比特精度恢复需要保留内部几何结构，而非仅仅匹配输出。
AI.method: 本文提出CKA-QAD方法，在NVFP4低比特量化蒸馏过程中引入基于CKA（Centered Kernel Alignment）的轻量级正则化项，通过对齐学生模型与教师模型在每一层的Gram矩阵来保持内部表示的几何结构，作为KL散度输出匹配损失的补充约束。
AI.result: 在Nemotron 3 Nano和Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507两个模型上，CKA-QAD显著改善了量化学生模型的层间表示对齐程度，并在下游推理和编码任务上取得了实质性准确率提升，同时仅带来适度的训练开销。
AI.conclusion: CKA引导的表示对齐可以作为输出匹配的有效补充，为低比特量化LLM的精度恢复提供了一种实用方案，揭示了内部表示几何结构保护在量化蒸馏中的关键作用。

title: Global-Local Monte Carlo Tree Search in Vision-Language Models for Text-to-3D Indoor Scene Generation
summary: Large Vision-Language Models have achieved significant reasoning performance in various tasks.However, there are few studies on text-to-3D indoor scene generation with LVLMs. The main challenge is that prevailing LVLM-based methods employ chain-of-thought sequential decision mechanisms that cannot revise earlier decisions, causing error propagation.In this paper, we consider the task as a planning problem constrained by spatial and layout commonsense.To solve this problem, we model it as a tree search problem with global and local trees, which differs from existing sequential decision-making approaches.In the global tree, we place each object iteratively and explore multiple attempts like humans furnishing a room, where the problem space is represented as a tree.To effectively search the tree, we propose a hierarchical scene representation and a PRM-guided MCTS method.The hierarchical representation abstracts a scene into room level, region level, floor object level, and supported object level.The PRM-guided MCTS method uses the PRM to prune unnecessary branches and the MCTS algorithm to balance exploration and exploitation to get an optimal solution with fewer attempts.In the local tree, it further decomposes the placement of each object into finer sub-steps, including the specific placement parameters.To make the whole appearance of the scene consistent, we leverage pre-trained diffusion image generative models to predict textures for all the objects in the scene.As existing benchmarks for text-to-3D indoor scene generation remain limited in scale and diversity, we collect a new large-scale diverse dataset that contains 65 scene types and 3,250 instructions with diverse sizes, layouts, and styles, named 3DTindo-bench, to better assess the capability of the state-of-the-art models. Our experiments show that our method generates more realistic 3D scenes than state-of-the-art approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于PRM引导的MCTS树搜索方法，将文本到3D室内场景生成建模为全局树与局部树的规划问题，并引入分层场景表示和扩散模型纹理预测，在自建大规模数据集3DTindo-bench上生成更逼真的3D场景。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）的文本到3D室内场景生成方法采用链式思维顺序决策机制，无法修正早期决策，导致错误传播；同时，现有benchmark在规模和多样性上均有限。本文旨在将场景生成建模为受空间和布局常识约束的规划问题，克服顺序决策的固有缺陷。
AI.method: 本文将任务建模为全局树与局部树的树搜索问题：全局树逐对象迭代放置并通过多次尝试探索不同布局方案，采用PRM（概率路线图）剪枝不必要分支，结合MCTS算法平衡探索与利用以最少尝试获得最优解；局部树进一步将每个对象的放置分解为细粒度子步骤（如具体放置参数）。场景层次化表示为房间级、区域级、地面物体级和支撑物体级四个层次，并利用预训练的扩散图像生成模型为场景中所有对象预测纹理，保持整体外观一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，本文方法在生成3D场景的真实感方面显著优于现有最先进方法。此外，为弥补现有benchmark规模和多样性的不足，本文收集并构建了3DTindo-bench，包含65种场景类型和3,250条多样化指令，覆盖不同尺寸、布局和风格，为模型评估提供了更大规模、更具多样性的标准化测试平台。
AI.conclusion: 将文本到3D室内场景生成重新定义为树搜索问题，并通过PRM引导的MCTS方法有效解决了顺序决策中的错误传播问题；层次化场景表示与扩散模型纹理预测进一步提升了生成场景的结构合理性与视觉一致性；所构建的3DTindo-bench为未来研究提供了更具挑战性和多样性的评估基准。

title: To Be Multimodal or Not to Be: Query-Adaptive Audio-Visual Person Retrieval via Active Modality Detection
summary: When retrieving a person from a video archive by voice and face, should the system be multimodal or not? In real-world broadcast archives, unlike curated benchmarks, a target may be heard but unseen, seen but unheard, or both. Fusing scores from an absent modality injects noise, degrading precision below the best unimodal system. We propose a query-adaptive framework that detects active modalities via cross-modal score consistency: when both modalities are active, files retrieved by one also score highly on the other; this agreement breaks down when a modality is absent. Classifiers driven by these cross-modal features achieve 89% detection accuracy. On the BBC Rewind corpus (with over 12,000 broadcast videos) the adaptive system attains 94.2% P@1, outperforming speaker-only (82.9%), face-only (93.4%), and fixed fusion (90.0%), recovering 64% of the gap to an oracle with ground-truth modality labels (96.6%).

AI.tldr: 提出一种查询自适应的多模态检索框架，通过跨模态分数一致性检测活跃模态，解决真实场景中目标信息缺失导致的噪声融合问题，在BBC Rewind数据集上达到94.2%的P@1，显著优于固定融合和单模态系统。
AI.motivation: 在实际广播档案检索中，目标人物可能仅出现在语音或视频中，而现有固定融合策略在缺失模态会引入噪声，导致精度低于最优单模态系统，因此需要一种能够动态感知哪些模态真正活跃的检索框架。
