AI.method: 提出一种查询自适应框架，通过跨模态分数一致性来检测活跃模态：当两个模态均活跃时，一个模态检索到的文件在另一模态中也会有高分，而模态缺失时这种一致性被破坏；利用这些跨模态特征训练的二元分类器实现89%的模态活跃检测准确率，并根据检测结果自适应地选择参与融合的模态。
AI.result: 在包含超过12,000个广播视频的BBC Rewind语料库上，自适应系统达到94.2%的P@1，优于纯语音（82.9%）、纯人脸（93.4%）和固定融合（90.0%）系统，并收窄了与拥有真实模态标签的Oracle系统（96.6%）之间64%的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，在真实多模态检索场景中，固定融合并非最佳策略；通过跨模态一致性检测动态判断模态活跃性并据此选择融合方式，可有效避免缺失模态的噪声注入，显著提升检索精度，为实际多模态检索系统设计提供了重要指导。

title: AdaMEM: Test-Time Adaptive Memory for Language Agents
summary: A central challenge for language agents is utilizing past experience to adapt to dynamic test-time conditions. While recent work demonstrates the promise of agentic memory mechanisms, most systems restrict retrieval to episode initiation. Consequently, agents are forced to rely on static guidance that becomes increasingly misaligned as long-horizon tasks unfold. To address this rigidity, we propose the Adaptive Memory Agent (AdaMEM), a novel framework for agent test-time adaptation. Without updating model parameters online, AdaMEM adapts agent behavior via a hybrid memory architecture: it maintains a long-term trajectory memory of raw experiences collected offline while generating dynamic short-term strategy memory on-the-fly to guide decision-making. This mechanism enables the trade-off between token efficiency and adaptability across varying inference-time compute levels. Empirically, AdaMEM significantly outperforms static memory baselines, achieving relative gains of up to 13% on ALFWorld and 11% on WebShop, with consistent leading performance extending to agentic search on HotpotQA. To further enhance this adaptation, we develop STEP-MFT, a Step-wise Memory Fine-Tuning technique that trains the policy to synthesize high-quality strategies from retrieved experiences, yielding additional performance gains. Our work establishes a new scaling dimension for agentic memory, supporting continuous reasoning and self-evolution post-deployment in real-world environments. Our code is available at https://github.com/yunx-z/AdaMEM.

AI.tldr: 提出AdaMEM，一种基于混合记忆架构的智能体测试时自适应框架，通过长时轨迹记忆与动态短时策略记忆协同工作，在不更新模型参数的情况下实现行为自适应，并结合STEP-MFT微调技术进一步提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语言智能体的记忆机制仅在回合开始时检索经验，导致在长时程任务中依赖的静态指导逐渐偏离实际需求，无法适应动态变化的测试环境。
AI.method: AdaMEM采用混合记忆架构：维护离线收集的原始经验作为长时轨迹记忆，同时在线生成动态短时策略记忆来实时指导决策，在不更新模型参数的前提下实现测试时自适应；进一步提出STEP-MFT（逐步骤记忆微调）技术，训练策略模型从检索到的经验中合成高质量策略。
AI.result: AdaMEM在ALFWorld上相对提升13%，在WebShop上相对提升11%，在HotpotQA的智能体搜索任务中也取得一致领先性能，且在不同推理时计算量下实现了token效率与自适应能力之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为智能体记忆建立了新的扩展维度，支持智能体在部署后持续推理与自我演化，为实际环境中智能体的动态适应提供了有效范式。

title: ReSAGE-PAR: Representational Similarity Assessment for Generative Expansion in Pedestrian Attribute Recognition
comment: Under review at IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT)
summary: To address the limited diversity and data scarcity in Pedestrian Attribute Recognition (PAR), we explore image synthesis using diffusion models guided by attribute-based prompts. While this enables the controlled generation of pedestrian images, it faces two critical challenges: (i) the domain gap between high-quality pre-training data and low-resolution, non-standard surveillance crops, and (ii) the need for reliable attribute verification to prevent generative hallucinations. In this paper, we introduce a robust generate-score-autolabel pipeline called ReSAGE-PAR (REpresentational Similarity Assessment for Generative Expansion in PAR) that bridges this domain gap and enables scalable, high-fidelity dataset expansion. First, we adapt pre-trained diffusion models to native PAR resolutions using a tailored LoRA-based Image-to-Image approach. Second, we extract vision-language alignment scores between the generated images and their conditioning prompts, utilizing a comprehensive prompting strategy that includes label-consistent and inconsistent complements. Finally, we formulate a Bayesian classifier that converts these continuous scores into reliable binary pseudo-labels. Extensive evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of ReSAGE-PAR in preserving spatial priors and verifying attributes. When integrated into PAR training, ReSAGE-PAR consistently yields significant improvements-achieving gains of up to 8.7% on standard backbones and pushing state-of-the-art frameworks to new performance levels. This proves its value as an architecture-agnostic solution for scalable PAR enhancement. The complete codebase for ReSAGE-PAR is publicly available at http://www-vpu.eps.uam.es/publications/ReSAGE-PAR.

AI.tldr: ReSAGE-PAR提出了一种基于扩散模型的生成-评分-自动标注流水线，通过LoRA图像到图像适配、视觉语言对齐评分和贝叶斯分类器生成可靠伪标签，实现行人属性识别中低分辨率监控图像的规模化高保真数据集扩展，在标准骨干网络上带来高达8.7%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 行人属性识别面临训练数据多样性有限和数据稀缺的核心问题，现有扩散模型虽能实现基于属性提示的受控图像生成，但面临两大关键挑战：高质量预训练数据与低分辨率非标准监控图像之间的领域鸿沟，以及需要可靠的属性验证机制来防止生成模型产生幻觉。
AI.method: 提出ReSAGE-PAR流水线，包含三个核心步骤：首先，采用基于LoRA的图像到图像方法将预训练扩散模型适配到原生PAR低分辨率域；其次，提取生成图像与其条件提示之间的视觉语言对齐分数，采用包含标签一致与不一致补全的综合提示策略；最后，构建贝叶斯分类器将连续对齐分数转化为可靠的二值伪标签，实现无需人工标注的自动属性验证。
AI.result: 在标准骨干网络上ReSAGE-PAR带来最高8.7%的性能增益，推动现有最优框架达到新的性能水平，且作为架构无关的解决方案在多种PAR训练框架中均能稳定提升效果，验证了其在保持空间先验和属性验证方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ReSAGE-PAR证明了基于扩散模型的可控图像生成结合自动属性验证能够有效弥补低分辨率监控域与预训练数据域之间的差距，为PAR任务提供了一种可扩展、高保真且与架构无关的数据增强方案，代码已公开供后续研究使用。

title: Beyond Alignment: Value Diversity as a Collective Property in Multicultural Agent Systems
summary: Multicultural multi-agent systems are increasingly deployed in globally diverse settings, where different agents are grounded in different cultural backgrounds. Existing cultural evaluation focuses on value alignment: how closely a single agent matches a target culture. Yet alignment is a per-agent property and cannot reveal whether a system, taken as a whole, preserves the cultural plurality it is meant to represent. We propose value diversity as a system-level evaluation axis for multicultural agent systems, defined through the dissimilarity between culturally conditioned agents' responses on a shared value survey. Using the World Values Survey, we evaluate 19 cultures and 18 backbone models across a wide range of system configurations. We find that diversity is largely uncorrelated with alignment, indicating that the two capture complementary system properties, and that current multicultural agent systems fall substantially below human societies in value diversity. Mixed-backbone systems narrow this gap but do not close it, and the gap persists across culture compositions and agent scales. Social interaction further erodes diversity by driving agents toward consensus, and a participatory budgeting case study shows that this homogenization narrows the breadth of collective decision-making. Together, our results establish value diversity as a distinct evaluation axis for multicultural multi-agent systems and reveal a persistent homogenization tendency in current LLM-based societies. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/iNLP-Lab/MultiAgent-Diversity.

AI.tldr: 提出价值多样性（value diversity）作为多文化多智能体系统的系统级评估指标，发现当前基于LLM的多智能体系统的价值多样性远低于人类社会，且社会互动会进一步加剧价值同质化，削弱集体决策的广度。
AI.motivation: 现有文化评估仅关注单智能体的价值对齐（value alignment），无法反映多文化多智能体系统作为一个整体是否保留了其应代表的文化多元性，因此需要一种系统级的评估维度来衡量文化多样性。
AI.method: 定义价值多样性为不同文化背景的智能体在共享价值调查中响应的不相似性，基于世界价值观调查（World Values Survey）对19种文化和18个基础模型在多种系统配置下进行评估，并通过参与式预算案例研究考察社会互动对多样性的影响。
AI.result: 价值多样性与价值对齐基本不相关，表明两者捕捉的是互补的系统属性；当前多文化多智能体系统的价值多样性远低于人类社会；混合基础模型的系统能缩小这一差距但无法消除；社会互动会进一步侵蚀多样性，导致集体决策范围变窄。
AI.conclusion: 价值多样性是评估多文化多智能体系统的独立且重要的指标，当前LLM驱动的智能体社会存在持续的同质化倾向，需要新的方法在设计层面保留文化多样性。

title: PerceptUI: LLM Agents as Human-Aligned Synthetic Users for UI/UX Evaluation
summary: User interface (UI) and user experience (UX) evaluation is central to product development, yet reliable feedback still relies on recruiting human participants or running online A/B tests, making early-stage iteration slow and costly. In light of this, recent work has explored Multimodal Large Language Models as proxy evaluators. However, existing approaches either produce surface-level critiques or a judgment that reflects the model's own biases rather than the genuine response of a particular user. We introduce PerceptUI, a framework for persona-conditioned UI/UX evaluation that predicts how a specific user would answer interface-related questions and produces natural-language rationales. PerceptUI is trained in two stages: (i) contrastive reflection fine-tuning distills teacher-generated rationales by extracting lessons from human decisions, and (ii) a reflective prompt-evolution step from the model's own failure traces. Across multiple domains and datasets, PerceptUI achieves human-level realism, generalizes to unseen questions and personas, and yields population-level response distributions.

AI.tldr: PerceptUI 提出了一种基于人物画像的多模态大语言模型框架，通过对比反思微调和反思式提示进化两阶段训练，能够预测特定用户对界面问题的回答并生成自然语言解释，在多个数据集上达到人类级别的真实感和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统的UI/UX评估依赖人工被试或在线A/B测试，成本高、速度慢，难以支持早期迭代。现有基于多模态大语言模型的代理评估方法要么只给出浅层批评，要么反映模型自身偏见而非真实用户的反应，缺乏针对特定用户画像进行精细化评估的能力。
AI.method: PerceptUI 采用两阶段训练框架：第一阶段是对比反思微调（contrastive reflection fine-tuning），从人类决策中提取教师生成的推理依据；第二阶段是反思式提示进化（reflective prompt-evolution），从模型自身的失败轨迹中学习改进。该框架支持人物画像条件化的UI/UX评估，能够预测特定用户对界面相关问题的回答并输出自然语言推理过程。
AI.result: 在多个领域和数据集上，PerceptUI 达到了人类级别的真实感，能够泛化到未见过的问答对和人物画像，并生成与真实人群分布一致的响应分布。实验证明了其在人物画像条件下评估的准确性和跨域迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: PerceptUI 为UI/UX评估提供了可扩展的代理方案，通过人物画像条件化克服了传统方法中的偏见问题，实现了与人类评估高度一致的反馈。该工作表明，结合人类决策推理和自省式学习可以显著提升多模态大语言模型作为评估代理的真实性，为早期产品迭代中的快速用户反馈获取开辟了新路径。

title: Knowledge Distillation for Visual Autoregressive Models
summary: Autoregressive (AR) image generation models are highly expressive but computationally intensive, motivating effective model compression. Knowledge distillation (KD) is a natural approach for model compression and has been widely studied in language modeling, yet its behavior in visual AR generation remains underexplored. In this work, we present the first systematic study of distillation strategies for AR image models. Our analysis shows that while standard distillation can yield meaningful gains, recent methods developed for language do not directly transfer to images: long decoding horizons and visual token ambiguity make teacher supervision unreliable especially under student-conditioned contexts. To address this, we propose VarKD, a distillation framework for visual autoregressive models that distills on student samples while selectively applying teacher supervision and reducing token-level ambiguity. Experiments on ImageNet across multiple AR backbones show that VarKD consistently outperforms prior distillation baselines, narrowing the gap to large-scale models.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究了视觉自回归图像生成模型的知识蒸馏策略，发现语言模型蒸馏方法无法直接迁移到图像领域，并提出了针对视觉自回归模型的蒸馏框架VarKD，通过选择性教师监督和减少令牌级歧义，在多个AR骨干网络上显著优于已有蒸馏基线，缩小了与大模型的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 自回归图像生成模型计算开销巨大，亟需有效的模型压缩方法；知识蒸馏在语言建模中已被广泛研究，但其在视觉自回归生成任务中的行为尚未被系统探索，且语言领域的蒸馏方法因长解码视野和视觉令牌歧义无法直接迁移到图像任务中。
AI.method: VarKD框架针对视觉自回归模型提出，核心策略是在学生采样样本上进行蒸馏，同时选择性应用教师监督并减少令牌级别的歧义，以解决长解码视野下教师监督不可靠的问题。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上使用多个自回归骨干网络的实验表明，VarKD一致性地优于已有的蒸馏基线方法，显著缩小了压缩模型与大规模教师模型之间的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了语言和视觉自回归模型在知识蒸馏上的本质差异，表明直接迁移语言蒸馏策略在图像任务中效果有限，VarKD为视觉自回归模型压缩提供了一种有效且通用的蒸馏框架。

title: EGTR-Review: Efficient Evidence-Grounded Scientific Peer Review Generation via Multi-Agent Teacher Distillation
summary: Scientific peer review generation has attracted increasing attention for reducing reviewing burdens and providing timely feedback. However, existing Large Language Model (LLM)-based methods often produce generic comments with insufficient evidence support and weak source traceability, while complex multi-agent systems incur high inference costs. To address these challenges, we propose EGTR-Review, an Evidence-Grounded and Traceable Review Generation framework via Multi-Agent Teacher Distillation. EGTR-Review first constructs a multi-agent teacher that performs structure-aware paper decomposition, key-element extraction, external scholarly evidence retrieval, evidence-state labeling, verification reasoning, and review synthesis. It then distills both intermediate reasoning trajectories and final review comments into a lightweight student model through task-prefix-driven multi-task learning. An evidence-weighted objective further reduces the influence of weak, missing, or non-verifiable supervision. Experiments on public peer-review datasets show that EGTR-Review (Student) outperforms strong prompt-based, fine-tuned, and structured/agentic baselines across automatic metrics, LLM-as-Judge evaluation, and human evaluation, while maintaining strong factual grounding and source traceability with substantially lower token consumption and inference time. Our code, prompts, configurations, and sample data are available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: EGTR-Review提出了一种基于多智能体教师蒸馏的证据驱动且可溯源的同行评审生成框架，通过将复杂多智能体的推理轨迹和评审结果蒸馏到轻量级学生模型中，在保证证据支撑和源可追溯性的同时显著降低了推理成本。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的科学同行评审生成方法存在两大问题：基于提示或微调的方法生成的评论缺乏证据支撑和源可追溯性，而多智能体系统虽能缓解这些问题但推理成本高昂，亟需一种既能保证评审质量和可溯源性又能控制计算开销的方法。
AI.method: EGTR-Review框架首先构建一个多智能体教师系统，执行结构感知的论文分解、关键元素提取、外部学术证据检索、证据状态标注、验证推理和评审合成；随后通过任务前缀驱动的多任务学习，将中间推理轨迹和最终评审结果蒸馏到轻量级学生模型中，并引入证据加权目标函数以降低弱证据、缺失证据或不可验证监督信号的影响。
AI.result: 在公开同行评审数据集上的实验表明，EGTR-Review（学生模型）在自动评估指标、LLM作为评判者的评估以及人工评估中均优于基于提示、微调、结构化流程和智能体系统的基线方法，同时在保持强事实依据和源可追溯性的前提下，显著降低了Token消耗和推理时间。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了通过多智能体教师蒸馏实现高效、可追溯且证据驱动的评审生成是可行的，为低成本的自动化同行评审系统提供了新范式，其开源代码和配置有助于推动该领域进一步研究。

title: Seeing Time: Benchmarking Chronological Reasoning and Shortcut Biases in Vision-Language Models
summary: Recent advancements in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have significantly enhanced their ability to interpret complex visual semantics, yet their capacity for chronological reasoning remains under-explored. In this paper, we introduce a novel benchmark specifically designed to evaluate how VLMs perceive and reason about chronological information within and across images. Unlike existing video-based benchmarks that focus on frame sequencing, our work delves into the underlying logic of chronological judgment and the expansion toward multimodal integration. To facilitate this, we construct three specialized datasets: one containing visually similar objects spanning long historical durations, another categorized by diverse event and object types, and a third pairing images with time-sensitive news text for cross-modal alignment. Through extensive experiments, we analyze whether models exhibit performance disparities across categories and, crucially, explore whether they rely on ``incorrect shortcuts'', such as image color rather than genuine chronological features. Our results reveal that while VLMs show promise, they frequently exploit superficial cues like grayscale versus color filters to bypass authentic chronological reasoning. By providing these high-quality datasets and a rigorous evaluation framework, we offer a diagnostic tool to identify current limitations and guide the development of more robust, logically grounded multimodal models. The source code is shown in https://github.com/LuoRenqiang/ChronoVision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ChronoVision基准，通过三个专门构建的数据集系统评估视觉语言模型在图像内和跨图像的时间顺序推理能力，揭示了模型常依赖颜色等表面线索而非真正时间特征进行判断的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在解释复杂视觉语义方面取得了显著进展，但其时间顺序推理能力尚未得到充分探索，且已有的视频基准主要关注帧序列，缺乏对时间判断底层逻辑及多模态对齐的深入评估。
AI.method: 本文构建了三个专门数据集：包含跨越长时间历史的视觉相似物体数据集、按不同事件和物体类型分类的数据集、以及将图像与时间敏感新闻文本配对用于跨模态对齐的数据集，并设计了评估框架来检测模型是否依赖颜色等虚假捷径而非真实时间特征。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，视觉语言模型在时间顺序推理任务中表现有限，且频繁利用如灰度与彩色滤镜等表面线索来绕过真正的时间推理，在不同类别间存在明显的性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了高质量数据集和严格评估框架作为诊断工具，揭示了当前视觉语言模型在逻辑化时间推理方面的根本缺陷，为开发更鲁棒、更具逻辑基础的多模态模型提供了指导方向。

title: HyperVis: Continuous Latent Visual Relational Graphs on the Lorentz Hyperboloid for Compositional Reasoning
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) struggle with compositional reasoning that requires understanding inter-object relationships. A natural remedy is to inject explicit scene graph triplets $\langle s, p, o \rangle$ from an off-the-shelf scene graph generator (SGG), but we show this backfires: discrete text labels collide with the continuous visual modality, degrading GQA accuracy from 60.38\% to 58.86\%. We propose \textbf{HyperVis}, which bypasses the SGG semantic bottleneck entirely. From $N$ class-agnostic region proposals, we compute a dense $O(N^2)$ visual relation tensor via spatially-biased cross-attention, project it onto a Lorentz hyperboloid, and enforce hierarchy through spatial physics, namely IoA-driven entailment cones and exterior-angle repulsion. We discover that HyperVis contributes in two complementary ways: (1) as a \emph{training-time regularizer}, the hyperbolic relational losses shape LoRA representations that improve generative VQA (GQA 61.03\% vs.\ 57.21\% for LoRA fine-tuning without relational losses, recovering and surpassing the baseline); and (2) as an \emph{inference-time relational encoder}, hyperbolic prefix tokens boost discriminative compositional scoring (SugarCrepe 79.94\%, $+$6.25pp over baseline). The learned curvature stabilises at $κ{=}4.0$, an order of magnitude above prior hyperbolic VLMs where $κ$ typically collapses toward zero, indicating that continuous visual features genuinely require the exponential volume of strongly curved space. A controlled Euclidean ablation confirms this decomposition: the relational pipeline regularises LoRA comparably in flat space (GQA 60.81\%), but the compositionality gain is specifically hyperbolic (SugarCrepe $+$4.58pp over Euclidean), with entailment loss ${\sim}6{\times}$ higher in Euclidean training. Codes are available at TBA.

AI.tldr: HyperVis 通过构建基于视觉区域提议的稠密关系张量并将其投影到洛伦兹双曲面，在不依赖离散场景图标签的情况下为 VLM 提供关系建模能力，作为训练正则化器提升生成式 VQA 性能并作为推理时关系编码器提升组合性判别评分，揭示了强曲率双曲空间对连续视觉特征关系学习的必要性。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型（VLM）在处理物体间关系的组合推理任务中存在固有缺陷，现有方案引入外部场景图生成器（SGG）注入离散三元组标签会因文本标签与连续视觉模态之间的语义瓶颈而导致性能下降（GQA 准确率从 60.38% 降至 58.86%），因此需要一种无需离散语义标注、能直接在连续视觉特征中建模关系结构的方法。
AI.method: HyperVis 从 N 个类别无关的区域提议出发，通过空间偏置的交叉注意力计算稠密的 O(N²) 视觉关系张量，然后将其投影到洛伦兹双曲面上，并利用空间物理约束（IoA 驱动的包含锥和外角排斥机制）强制执行层次结构。该方法以两种互补方式发挥作用：(1) 作为训练时正则化器，通过双曲关系损失约束 LoRA 表示，提升生成式 VQA 性能；(2) 作为推理时关系编码器，通过双曲前缀令牌增强判别式组合性评分。
AI.result: HyperVis 在生成式 VQA 任务上将 GQA 准确率提升至 61.03%（基线 LoRA 微调为 57.21%，恢复并超越无关系损失的基线 60.38%）；在组合性判别任务 SugarCrepe 上达到 79.94%（较基线提升 6.25 个百分点）。学习曲率稳定在 κ=4.0，比此前双曲 VLM 高一个数量级（后者 κ 通常趋近于零），表明连续视觉特征需要强曲率空间的指数级容量。欧几里得消融实验显示关系流水线在平直空间中也能正则化 LoRA（GQA 60.81%），但组合性增益特属于双曲空间（SugarCrepe 较欧几里得提升 4.58 个百分点），且欧几里得训练中包含损失高出约 6 倍。
AI.conclusion: HyperVis 证明了在连续视觉特征空间中直接建模关系结构能够替代离散场景图注入方案，且强曲率双曲空间（κ=4.0）对视觉关系学习具有独特优势——其指数级容量和层次结构约束是组合性推理性能提升的关键，而欧几里得空间虽能实现类似的正则化效果但无法提供同等的关系建模增益。

title: LatentSkill: From In-Context Textual Skills to In-Weight Latent Skills for LLM Agents
summary: Agent systems increasingly use textual skills to encode reusable task procedures, but injecting these skills into the prompt at every step incurs substantial context overhead and exposes skill content as plaintext. We present LatentSkill, a framework that converts textual skills into plug-and-play LoRA adapters through a pretrained hypernetwork. LatentSkill stores skill knowledge in weight space rather than context space, removing per-step skill tokens while preserving modular loading, scaling, and composition. On ALFWorld and Search-QA, LatentSkill outperforms the corresponding in-context skill baseline while using substantially fewer prefill tokens: it improves ALFWorld success by 21.4 and 13.4 points on the seen and unseen splits with 64.1% fewer prefill tokens, and improves Search-QA exact match by 3.0 points with 72.2% lower skill-token overhead. Further analysis shows that generated skill LoRAs form a structured semantic geometry, can be precisely controlled via the LoRA scaling coefficient, and can be composed through parameter-space arithmetic when skill components are aligned. These findings suggest that weight-space skills provide an efficient, modular, and less exposed substrate for extending LLM agents.

AI.tldr: LatentSkill 提出将文本技能转换为 LoRA 适配器的框架，通过超网络将技能知识存储在权重空间而非上下文空间中，从而消除每步推理中的技能 token 开销，在 ALFWorld 和 Search-QA 上优于上下文技能基线并大幅降低预填充 token 数量。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体系统将可复用的文本技能注入提示词中，导致每一步推理都产生显著的上下文开销，且技能内容以明文形式暴露，存在隐私和安全风险；同时，上下文窗口大小限制了可加载技能的数量。
AI.method: LatentSkill 框架利用预训练的超网络将文本技能转化为即插即用的 LoRA 适配器，将技能知识存储于模型权重空间而非上下文空间，保留模块化加载、缩放和组合能力，从根本上消除了每步推理中的技能 token 消耗。
AI.result: 在 ALFWorld 上，LatentSkill 在 seen 和 unseen 分片上分别提升 21.4 和 13.4 个百分点的成功率，同时减少 64.1% 的预填充 token；在 Search-QA 上提升 3.0 个百分点的精确匹配率，技能 token 开销降低 72.2%。
AI.conclusion: 生成的技能 LoRA 形成结构化的语义几何空间，可通过 LoRA 缩放系数精确控制，并在技能组件对齐时通过参数空间算术实现组合；权重空间技能为扩展 LLM 智能体提供了一种高效、模块化且暴露度更低的替代方案。

title: Critic-Guided Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Reasoning for Reliable Mathematical Problem Solving
summary: Recent Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown impressive reasoning abilities; but they are still susceptible to hallucinations, intermediate reasoning mistakes, and unreliable reasoning results in complex mathematical reasoning problems. In this study, we introduce a critic-based heterogeneous multi-agent approach to improve the dependability of mathematical reasoning. This framework incorporates several LLM agents of different specialties and employs a critic-driven adaptive learning system to assess and guide the reasoning process based on intermediate feedback. The system adopts a generator-validator framework, with the validator not only determining correctness but also offering critiques to guide regeneration of solutions. This allows for adaptive error correction and prevents error cascading. Our experiments on the GSM8K benchmark show that the proposed method achieves up to 13% accuracy improvement over single-shot and non-critic models. Additionally, findings suggest that heterogeneity and critique reduce the need for large models, allowing smaller models to perform on par. Ablation studies reveal the main performance gains are due to the critic-based feedback loop and not model size. In summary, the proposed approach showcases the benefits of combining heterogeneous multi-agent collaboration and critique to obtain reliable and interpretable reasoning systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于批评者的异构多智能体框架，通过生成器-验证器架构和自适应批评反馈机制提升大语言模型在数学推理任务中的可靠性，在GSM8K上实现了高达13%的准确率提升，并表明异构性与批评机制可降低对模型规模的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在复杂数学推理任务中仍存在幻觉、中间推理错误以及推理结果不可靠等问题，亟需一种能够增强推理过程可靠性和可解释性的方法。
AI.method: 提出一种基于批评者的异构多智能体框架，集成多个不同专长的LLM智能体，采用生成器-验证器架构；验证器不仅判断正确性，还提供批评性反馈以指导解决方案的重新生成，实现自适应错误纠正并防止错误级联，同时引入批评驱动的自适应学习系统来评估和引导推理过程。
AI.result: 在GSM8K基准上的实验表明，该方法相比单次推理和非批评模型实现了高达13%的准确率提升；消融实验证实性能提升主要源于批评反馈循环而非模型规模增大；异构性和批评机制使较小模型也能达到与大模型相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本研究表明异构多智能体协作与批评反馈相结合能够获得更可靠且可解释的推理系统，为提升LLM在复杂推理任务中的可信度提供了有效路径，同时揭示了批评机制可替代模型规模增长以获取性能提升。

title: Where, What, Why, and Importance: Structured Defect Grounding for Text-to-Image Feedback
summary: Despite generating increasingly photorealistic images, text-to-image (T2I) models still exhibit localized, subtle, and structurally complex failures. Diagnosing these failures requires instance-level feedback that answers where a defect occurs, what type it is, why it is defective, and its importance to overall image quality. While recent dense-feedback methods move beyond scalar supervision, their heatmap-centric representations still formulate diagnosis as pixel-field regression, making it difficult to localize variable-cardinality defects and bind semantic reasons to individual failures. To address this representation bottleneck, we propose Structured Defect Grounding (SDG), which casts T2I diagnosis as structured set prediction by modeling each defect as a (location, type, reason, importance) tuple. To make this formulation trainable and measurable, we introduce SDG-30K, a 30K-image dataset with box-grounded annotations across four modern T2I generators, together with a dedicated evaluation protocol, SDG-Eval. Building on this structured representation, we further present a diagnosis-to-alignment framework in which a Vision-Language Model (VLM) serves as the SDG detector, and BoxFlow-GRPO converts predicted defect sets into box-derived, importance-weighted spatial rewards for diffusion model alignment. Extensive experiments show that our SDG detector outperforms leading proprietary VLMs on structured defect grounding, while SDG-guided rewards consistently improve T2I alignment and support localized image refinement. These results establish SDG as a unified, instance-level interface for diagnosing, evaluating, and enhancing modern generative models.

AI.tldr: 提出结构化缺陷定位（SDG）框架，将文本到图像生成模型的诊断问题建模为结构化集合预测，每个缺陷用（位置、类型、原因、重要性）元组表示；构建了SDG-30K数据集和SDG-Eval评估协议，并基于此设计了VLMs检测器与BoxFlow-GRPO对齐框架，在缺陷定位和生成质量对齐上均取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型虽能生成逼真图像，但仍存在局部、细微且结构复杂的缺陷；现有密集反馈方法依赖热力图表示，将诊断问题简化为像素级回归，难以定位可变数量的缺陷，也无法将语义原因绑定到具体的实例级失败上，存在表征瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出结构化缺陷定位（SDG）框架，将T2I诊断建模为结构化集合预测，每个缺陷表示为（位置、类型、原因、重要性）四元组；构建包含30K图像、来自四种现代T2I生成器的框级标注数据集SDG-30K及专用评估协议SDG-Eval；在此基础上设计诊断到对齐（diagnosis-to-alignment）框架，其中VLMs作为SDG检测器，BoxFlow-GRPO将预测的缺陷集合转换为基于框导出的、重要性加权的空间奖励，用于扩散模型对齐。
AI.result: SDG检测器在结构化缺陷定位任务上优于领先的专有VLMs；基于SDG引导的奖励信号持续提升了T2I模型的生成对齐质量，并支持局部图像精细化修复。
AI.conclusion: SDG建立了一个统一的、实例级的接口，用于诊断、评估和增强现代生成模型，为生成模型的质量评估与自动修复提供了新的范式。

title: CHALIS: A Challenge Dataset for Language Identification in Difficult Scenarios
summary: We present CHALIS (Challenging Language Identification Samples), a new benchmark dataset explicitly designed to address difficult cases in language identification: cousin languages and orthographic noise. Our dataset has two parts: First, we collected sentences shared across mutually intelligible language pairs (Czech/Slovak, Spanish/Catalan, Portuguese/Galician, Danish/Norwegian). The second part tests for orthography noise: we transliterate text across multiple scripts, remove diacritics, simulate homoglyph attacks, and use Internet slang. We evaluate four widely used language identification systems on CHALIS and demonstrate that all struggle substantially in these scenarios, especially on lower-resource languages within cousin pairs and on transliterated input. The resource is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/michal-tichy/CHALIS.

AI.tldr: CHALIS 是一个专门针对语言识别中困难场景（亲缘语言和拼写噪声）设计的新基准数据集，实验表明现有主流语言识别系统在此类场景下表现严重不足。
AI.motivation: 现有语言识别系统在标准数据集上表现良好，但在处理亲缘语言（相互可理解的语种对）和拼写噪声（跨脚本音译、去变音符号、同形字攻击、网络俚语）等困难场景时性能显著下降，目前缺乏专门针对这些挑战的高质量评测基准。
AI.method: CHALIS 数据集由两部分构成：第一部分收集了四组相互可理解的亲缘语言对（捷克语/斯洛伐克语、西班牙语/加泰罗尼亚语、葡萄牙语/加利西亚语、丹麦语/挪威语）中的真实句子；第二部分通过跨脚本音译、去除变音符号、模拟同形字攻击和使用网络俚语等方式构造拼写噪声样本。作者使用该数据集对四种广泛使用的语言识别系统进行了评估。
AI.result: 所有四种被评估的语言识别系统在 CHALIS 数据集上均表现出显著性能下降，尤其是在亲缘语言对中的低资源语言以及音译输入场景下表现尤为困难。
AI.conclusion: CHALIS 揭示了当前语言识别系统在处理亲缘语言和拼写噪声方面的系统性缺陷，为语言识别领域的鲁棒性研究提供了一个具有挑战性的评测基准和公开资源。

title: DiG-Plan: Mitigating Early Commitment for Tool-Graph Planning via Diffusion Guidance
comment: Accepted at IJCAI-ECAI 2026. This is an author preprint; the final version will appear in the IJCAI Proceedings
summary: Generating executable tool plans requires selecting appropriate subsets from tool libraries, a combinatorial search problem with an exponentially large solution space. However, we identify a critical misalignment in predominant approaches: standard autoregressive (AR) decoding suffers from early commitment, where initial token choices rigidly constrain the search trajectory. A controlled study shows that masked denoising raises Pass@10 solution coverage from 0.320 to 0.943 over AR sampling under matched compute. Motivated by this, we propose DiG-Plan, a framework that decouples combinatorial exploration from structural refinement. DiG-Plan employs a diffusion-based proposer to generate diverse tool sets via iterative refinement, followed by an AR refiner for dependency prediction. On TaskBench, DiG-Plan improves over AR baselines by a 10% relative margin, with the largest gains on complex compositional tasks; API-Bank results show that the propose-refine-select design remains effective across domains. Code is available at https://github.com/puddingyeah/DiG-Plan.

AI.tldr: 针对自回归解码在工具规划中因早期承诺导致搜索空间受限的问题，提出DiG-Plan框架，将组合探索与结构精化解耦，通过扩散模型生成多样化工具集、自回归模型预测依赖关系，在TaskBench和API-Bank上显著超越基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用标准自回归（AR）解码生成工具规划时存在严重的对齐问题：初始token选择会僵化地约束后续搜索轨迹，导致早期承诺（early commitment），难以在指数级放大的组合空间中有效地探索高质量工具集。
AI.method: 提出DiG-Plan框架，将组合探索与结构精解耦：采用基于扩散模型的提议器（diffusion-based proposer）通过迭代去噪生成多样化的工具集合，再由自回归精炼器（AR refiner）预测工具间的依赖关系，形成“提议-精炼-选择”的流水线设计。
AI.result: 受控实验表明，在同等计算量下，掩码去噪将Pass@10的解决方案覆盖率从AR采样的0.320提升至0.943。在TaskBench上，DiG-Plan超越AR基线10%的相对提升，在复杂组合任务上增益最大；API-Bank结果验证了该提议-精炼-选择设计跨领域的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将组合搜索与结构生成解耦能有效缓解自回归解码的早期承诺问题，扩散模型在工具集多样性探索上具有显著优势，为工具规划领域提供了一种新的范式思路。

title: RQUL-UIE: Revitalizing Quality-Unstable Labels for Underwater Image Enhancement via In-Dataset Self-Supervision
summary: Underwater Image Enhancement (UIE) is essential for mitigating degradations caused by water medium. Although learning-based methods have advanced significantly, most rely on paired datasets with unstable label quality, which bottlenecks model performance. This paper proposes a diffusion-based, in-dataset self-supervised learning strategy designed to exploit the quality distribution of training labels. Specifically, we evaluate label quality via semantic perception embeddings from a pre-trained diffusion model in a training-free manner. These quality scores are subsequently quantized into noise-level indices, guiding a multi-step denoising process for level-wise supervision. This mechanism prevents low-quality labels from degrading the model while maximizing their utility during training. Furthermore, a Fourier-based refinement network is incorporated to explicitly reconstruct high-frequency components. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms SOTA approaches in restoration quality. The code and pre-trained model will be available once accepted in link.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的域内自监督学习策略用于水下图像增强，通过无训练方式评估标签质量并量化为噪声级索引以指导多步去噪过程，同时结合傅里叶细化网络重建高频分量，在多个基准上超越现有最先进方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的水下图像增强方法严重依赖成对数据集，但训练标签质量不稳定且难以保证，这成为制约模型性能的瓶颈。现有方法无法有效利用质量分布不均的训练标签，低质量标签可能导致模型退化，而简单丢弃又会损失数据效用。
AI.method: 提出一种基于扩散模型的域内自监督学习策略：首先利用预训练扩散模型的语义感知嵌入，以无训练方式评估标签质量；然后将质量得分量化为噪声级索引，用于指导多步去噪过程的逐级监督；同时引入基于傅里叶变换的细化网络以显式重建图像的高频成分。
AI.result: 在多个水下图像增强基准上的大量实验表明，所提方法在恢复质量上持续优于当前最先进的算法，证明了其在利用质量分布不均的训练数据方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了通过扩散模型内在的语义感知能力实现标签质量评估并用于逐级监督的可行路径，为在标签质量不稳定场景下的水下图像增强提供了新的自监督范式，同时代码和预训练模型将开源以促进后续研究。

title: Improving Answer Extraction in Context-based Question Answering Systems Using LLMs
summary: Question answering (QA) systems have achieved notable progress with the advent of large language models (LLMs). However, they still face challenges in accurately extracting and generating precise answers from given contexts, particularly when dealing with complex or ambiguous queries. Existing approaches often struggle with contextual understanding, answer consistency, and generalization across diverse domains. In this work, we propose a question answering system based on large language models, where the input consists of a textual context and a corresponding question, and the output is a concise and accurate answer. The motivation behind this research lies in addressing the limitations of current QA systems, particularly their tendency to produce irrelevant or imprecise responses despite having access to the correct context. Our methodology involves fine-tuning a pre-trained LLM on a benchmark QA dataset to improve its contextual comprehension and answer extraction capabilities. Specifically, we utilize the Stanford Question Answering Dataset (SQuAD1.1), which provides high-quality context-question-answer triplets for supervised training and evaluation. Experimental results show that the fine-tuned Roberta-base model achieves the highest performance, attaining a ROUGE-L score of 86.84%, a BLEU score of 28.24%, and a BERTScore of 95.38%. These results indicate strong accuracy and answer relevance, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed approach for context-based question answering tasks. Furthermore, the findings confirm that targeted fine-tuning substantially improves the reliability and precision of QA systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于RoBERTa-base模型在SQuAD1.1数据集上进行微调的问答系统，在上下文理解与答案提取任务中取得了ROUGE-L 86.84%、BLEU 28.24%和BERTScore 95.38%的优异性能，验证了针对性微调对提升问答系统可靠性与精度的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的问答系统在面对复杂或模糊查询时，仍存在上下文理解不足、答案一致性差以及跨领域泛化能力弱等问题，容易产生不相关或不精确的回答，亟需一种能有效提升上下文理解和答案提取精度的方法。
AI.method: 采用在预训练大语言模型基础上进行有监督微调的策略，使用SQuAD1.1基准数据集（包含高质量上下文-问题-答案三元组）进行训练和评估，以增强模型的上下文理解与答案抽取能力，最终选用RoBERTa-base作为基础模型。
AI.result: 微调后的RoBERTa-base模型在SQuAD1.1上取得了最佳性能：ROUGE-L分数达86.84%，BLEU分数达28.24%，BERTScore达95.38%，表明该方法在答案准确性和相关性方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 实验证实，针对特定问答任务的定向微调能够显著提升大语言模型在上下文问答中的可靠性与精确度，为构建更精准的问答系统提供了有效路径。

title: From Risk Classification to Action Plan Remediation: A Guardrail Feedback Driven Framework for LLM Agents
summary: LLM-based guardrails typically safeguard agents by evaluating proposed actions or inputs before execution, producing safety signals such as binary allow/deny decisions, risk categories, and/or explanatory rationales about potential policy violations. However, agent risks often arise when otherwise benign tasks are contaminated by untrusted external content, unsafe instructions, or risky tool use. Existing guardrails often flag the entire task uniformly as unsafe, thereby blocking the threat but sacrificing the benign part. Moreover, existing work largely evaluates guardrails in isolation, leaving unclear whether their interventions lead to safer downstream agent behavior. To address this, we introduce TRIAD (Tripartite Response for Iterative Agent Guardrailing), a guardrail-integrated agent framework that leverages guardrail-generated verbal feedback as a guiding signal to keep the agent aligned with benign objectives at each planning step. We finetune a language model on a self-curated training dataset to output one of three decisions: proceed, refuse, or update, together with structured natural-language feedback. Rather than merely allowing or blocking execution, update guides the agent to revise its plan, avoid harmful components, and preserve the benign task where possible. TRIAD injects this feedback into the agent's context, enabling subsequent plan revision and forming a closed loop between guardrail feedback and agent planning. Extensive experiments on ASB and AgentHarm show that TRIAD reduces the average attack success rate to 10.42%, while achieving the best safety-utility trade-off among guardrail-integrated baselines. Our code is available at: https://github.com/YUHAOSUNABC/TRIAD.

AI.tldr: TRIAD 提出了一种基于三态决策（proceed/refuse/update）的护栏集成智能体框架，通过将护栏生成的言语反馈注入智能体上下文形成闭环，在阻止有害行为的同时保留良性任务，在ASB和AgentHarm基准上将平均攻击成功率降至10.42%，实现了最佳的安全-效用权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的护栏通常对检测到威胁的整个任务进行统一拦截，牺牲了其中的良性部分；同时现有工作大多孤立评估护栏本身，未明确其能否改善下游智能体的实际行为安全性。
AI.method: TRIAD 框架包含一个微调后的语言模型，该模型输出三种决策之一（proceed、refuse或update）并附带结构化的自然语言反馈；update决策指导智能体修订其规划、移除有害组件，同时保留良性任务内容；TRIAD 将护栏反馈注入智能体的上下文，使后续规划修订与护栏反馈形成闭环。
AI.result: 在ASB和AgentHarm基准上的大量实验表明，TRIAD 将平均攻击成功率降至10.42%，并在所有集成了护栏的基线方法中实现了最优的安全-效用权衡。
AI.conclusion: TRIAD 通过细粒度的三态决策和闭环反馈机制，证明了护栏不仅能检测威胁，还能作为引导信号保持智能体与良性目标对齐，为构建更安全、更实用的智能体系统提供了有效路径。

title: Adversarial Attacks Already Tell the Answer: Directional Bias-Guided Test-time Defense for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs), such as CLIP, have shown strong zero-shot generalization but remain highly vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, posing serious risks in real-world applications. Test-time defenses for VLMs have recently emerged as a promising and efficient approach to defend against adversarial attacks without requiring costly large-scale retraining. In this work, we uncover a surprising phenomenon: under diverse input transformations, adversarial images in CLIP's feature space consistently shift along a dominant direction, in contrast to the dispersed patterns of clean images. We hypothesize that this dominant shift, termed the Defense Direction, opposes the adversarial shift, pointing features back toward their correct class centers. Building on this insight, we propose Directional Bias-guided Defense (DBD), a test-time framework that estimates the Defense Direction and employs a DB-score-based two-stream reconstruction strategy to recover robust representations. Experiments on 15 datasets demonstrate that DBD not only achieves SOTA adversarial robustness while preserving clean accuracy, but also reveals the counterintuitive result that adversarial accuracy can even surpass clean accuracy. This demonstrates that adversarial perturbations inherently encode directional priors about the true decision boundary.

AI.tldr: 本文发现CLIP视觉特征中对抗样本经输入变换后存在一致的防御方向，并提出Directional Bias-guided Defense (DBD)框架，通过方向偏置估计和双流重建策略实现SOTA级对抗鲁棒性，甚至使对抗准确率超过干净准确率。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）虽具备强大的零样本泛化能力，但对对抗扰动高度敏感，存在严重安全隐患；现有测试时防御方法虽无需大规模重训练，但对VLM的对抗鲁棒性仍不充分，亟需更高效的防御机制。
AI.method: 本文提出Directional Bias-guided Defense (DBD)框架，首先发现在多种输入变换下，CLIP特征空间中的对抗样本沿一个主导方向（Defense Direction）一致偏移，而干净样本则呈分散分布；基于此，DBD估计该防御方向，并采用DB-score驱动的双流重建策略恢复鲁棒特征表示，从而在测试阶段实现对抗防御。
AI.result: 在15个数据集上的实验表明，DBD在达到SOTA级对抗鲁棒性的同时保持干净准确率不下降，并展现出对抗准确率甚至超越干净准确率的反直觉现象。
AI.conclusion: 对抗扰动本身内嵌了关于真实决策边界的先验方向信息，利用这一方向偏置可以有效设计VLM的测试时防御；DBD验证了防御方向假设的有效性，为VLM鲁棒性研究提供了新视角。

title: LLMs Can Leak Training Data But Do They Want To? A Propensity-Aware Evaluation of Memorization in LLMs
summary: Large language models can reproduce training data, but existing memorization evaluations mostly measure whether models can be forced to do so, rather than whether they do so under ordinary use. We introduce PropMe, a propensity-aware framework for memorization evaluation that contrasts prefix-based capability attacks with non-adversarial evaluations. We propose a metric transformation that, applied to existing functions, allows to create propensity metrics. We further introduce SimpleTrace, a lightweight tracing pipeline built on infini-gram that deterministically attributes model generations to large-scale training corpora and computes verbatim, near-verbatim, and propensity-transformed memorization metrics. Evaluating two fully-open models: Comma and DFM Decoder on two datasets: Common Pile and Dynaword in two languages, we find a consistent gap between capability and propensity: prefix attacks elicit substantially stronger memorization signals than generic or dataset-specific prompts, while propensity scores remain low overall. Thus, the models can reveal training data when directly elicited, but rarely do so in more common non-adversarial settings. We also find that DFM Decoder, which is continually pre-trained from Comma, exhibits reduced memorization and memorization propensity for Common Pile, confirming that memorization capability can decrease when later training emphasizes partially different data. Our results suggest, and we encourage, that memorization audits should report both worst-case extractability and ordinary leakage propensity in order to have a more comprehensive view of this phenomenon.

AI.tldr: 提出PropMe框架，将记忆化评估从能力视角（对抗性前缀攻击）转向倾向性视角（非对抗性使用），并构建SimpleTrace溯源管线，发现模型在非对抗设置下泄露训练数据的倾向性远低于其被强制泄露的能力，建议记忆化审计应同时报告最坏情况可提取性和普通泄露倾向性。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型记忆化评估大多测量模型在被迫（如通过前缀攻击）下能否复现训练数据，而非在普通使用场景下是否实际这样做，缺乏对真实泄露倾向性的量化方法。
AI.method: 提出PropMe框架，通过度量变换将传统记忆化指标转换为倾向性感知指标；构建SimpleTrace轻量溯源管线，基于infini-gram将模型生成确定性归因至大规模训练语料，计算逐字、近字及倾向性变换后的记忆化度量。
AI.result: 在两个完全开放模型（Comma和DFM Decoder）和两个数据集（Common Pile和Dynaword）上，前缀攻击引发远强于通用或数据集特定提示的记忆化信号，而倾向性得分整体较低；DFM Decoder（从Comma持续预训练）在Common Pile上的记忆化能力和倾向性均降低。
AI.conclusion: 模型在对抗性设置下可被强制泄露训练数据，但在非对抗性设置下极少实际泄露；记忆化审计应同时报告最坏情况可提取性和普通泄露倾向性以获得全面认知。

title: When Tools Fail: Benchmarking Dynamic Replanning and Anomaly Recovery in LLM Agents
summary: Existing benchmarks evaluate Tool-Integrated Reasoning (TIR) in LLMs on idealized ''happy paths'', largely overlooking real-world tool failures. We introduce ToolMaze, a benchmark for dynamic path discovery and error recovery in TIR agents. To separate systematic replanning from blind trial-and-error, ToolMaze adopts a two-dimensional design: DAG-based topological complexity and a $2 \times 2$ taxonomy of tool perturbations (explicit/implicit, transient/permanent). Evaluations show that perturbations degrade performance across nearly all models, with the sharpest drops under implicit semantic failures. Driven by systemic over-trust in corrupted outputs, Perturbation Recovery Rate (PRR) plummets by around 37\% in these scenarios, while complex topologies trap agents in futile trial-and-error loops. Crucially, agentic fault-tolerance improves with model scale $3.66\times$ slower than basic task execution, highlighting dynamic replanning as a distinct bottleneck unaddressed by model scaling or prompting. Data and code are available at https://github.com/Zhudongsheng75/ToolMaze.

AI.tldr: ToolMaze提出了一种评估LLM工具集成推理（TIR）能力的基准，通过DAG拓扑复杂度与工具扰动分类学（显式/隐式、瞬时/永久）分离系统性重规划与盲目试错，揭示了模型对隐式语义故障的脆弱性及重规划能力随规模扩展的瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有TIR基准仅在理想化的"快乐路径"下评估LLM，忽略了真实世界中的工具故障，无法有效衡量模型在动态路径发现与错误恢复方面的能力。
AI.method: ToolMaze采用二维设计：基于DAG的拓扑复杂度衡量路径发现难度，以及一个2×2的工具扰动分类学（显式/隐式、瞬时/永久）来模拟真实工具故障，并通过扰动恢复率（PRR）等指标分离系统性重规划与盲目试错。
AI.result: 工具扰动导致几乎所有模型性能下降，隐式语义故障下PRR骤降约37%；复杂拓扑使模型陷入无效试错循环；代理容错能力随模型规模提升的速度比基本任务执行慢3.66倍。
AI.conclusion: 动态重规划是模型规模扩展或提示工程无法解决的关键瓶颈，隐式语义故障与拓扑复杂度是TIR系统的核心挑战。

title: StoryVideoQA: Scaling Deep Video Understanding with a Large-Scale, Multi-Genre and Auto-Generated Dataset
summary: Video question answering (VideoQA) aims to answer questions about given videos. While existing approaches excel on factoid VideoQA, they struggle with deep video understanding (DVU), which requires the comprehension of complex storylines. This challenge arises from the inherent long-range video content, multi-faceted question types, and instance-level story elements, all of which constrain the scale and diversity of manually constructed DVU datasets.These difficulties constrain the scale and diversity of manually-constructed DVU dataset. To address these, we previously introduced StoryMind to automatically construct DVU datasets with balanced fine-grained topics. Though it can generate high-quality question-answer pairs (QAs) for TV series, it suffers significant performance degradation when handling longer and more complex movies. In this paper, we further design StoryMindv2, an enhanced multi-agent collaboration framework to generate high-quality DVU datasets for both TV series and movies. By integrating a novel supervisor-guided generation mechanism and a refined multi-reviewer voting strategy, the framework is utilized to construct StoryVideoQA, the largest DVU dataset to date, featuring over 363K QAs on 393.2 hours diverse story videos including TV series (avg. 1,635 seconds) and movies (avg. 7,878 seconds). Comprehensive evaluations of 20 state-of-the-art VideoQA methods on this large-scale benchmark reveal that they cannot fully maintain long-range character associations or construct a coherent understanding of complex storylines. To bridge this gap, we propose PlotTree, a novel video understanding agent, re-organizing long-range video content into a hierarchical plot structure, enabling efficient storyline reasoning on StoryVideoQA. Project page: https://github.com/nercms-mmap/StoryVideoQA/

AI.tldr: 本文提出StoryMindv2，一种增强的多智能体协作框架，用于自动构建深度视频理解（DVU）数据集，并构建了迄今最大的DVU数据集StoryVideoQA（含363K+问答对，覆盖393.2小时影视内容）；同时提出PlotTree视频理解智能体，通过层次化情节结构重构长视频内容，实现了复杂故事线的有效推理。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答方法在事实型VideoQA上表现优异，但在需要理解复杂故事线的深度视频理解（DVU）任务上表现不佳，其核心挑战在于长视频内容、多类型问题及实例级故事元素限制了手动构建DVU数据集的规模与多样性；此前提出的StoryMind在电视剧集上表现良好，但在处理更长、更复杂的电影内容时性能显著下降，亟需能够同时覆盖电视剧和电影的高质量DVU数据生成方法。
AI.method: 本文设计了StoryMindv2，一种增强的多智能体协作框架，通过集成新颖的监督引导生成机制（supervisor-guided generation mechanism）和精炼的多审阅者投票策略（multi-reviewer voting strategy），自动生成高质量的DVU数据集；同时提出了PlotTree视频理解智能体，将长范围视频内容重新组织为层次化情节结构（hierarchical plot structure），支持基于该结构的高效故事线推理。
AI.result: 利用StoryMindv2构建了StoryVideoQA数据集，这是迄今最大的DVU基准，包含超过363K个问答对，覆盖393.2小时多样化故事视频（电视剧平均时长1,635秒，电影平均时长7,878秒）；在20种最先进VideoQA方法上的全面评估表明，现有方法无法完全维持长程角色关联或构建连贯的故事线理解。
AI.conclusion: 现有VideoQA方法在处理长视频中的人物关系保持和故事线连贯理解方面存在根本性局限，StoryMindv2有效解决了跨电视剧和电影的数据生成问题，PlotTree则通过层次化情节结构为长视频故事线推理提供了一种可行的解决方案，为深度视频理解研究提供了大规模高质量基准和新的技术方向。

title: Emergent Language as an Approach to Conscious AI
summary: The question of whether artificial systems can be conscious remains open, in part because existing approaches either evaluate systems against theory-derived checklists (discriminative) or engineer consciousness-inspired modules directly (architectural); both leave open whether observed structures are artifacts of human language priors. We propose a generative methodology: emergent language (EL) in multi-agent reinforcement learning, where agents start from minimal (no language, no concept of self, minimal exposure to human text) and develop communication under task pressure alone, ensuring causal attributability to task demands rather than inherited human language priors. We position our methodology by discussing how EL serves as a generative tool for studying consciousness-relevant structure, including the role of environment complexity and the interpretation of emergent communication. As a proof of concept, we instantiate this methodology in a minimal environment and show that agents develop self-referential communication, including an echo-mismatch detection circuit that is not predicted by task structure or architecture alone but emerges from a specific environmental affordance.

AI.tldr: 提出一种生成式方法论，利用多智能体强化学习中的涌现语言（EL）研究意识相关结构，通过最小化人类语言先验确保因果可归因性，并在最小环境中观察到自我指涉通信和回声-失配检测电路的出现。
AI.motivation: 现有研究意识的人工系统方法分为判别式（基于理论清单评估）和架构式（直接设计意识启发模块），两者都无法排除观察到的结构是否是人类语言先验的人为产物，因此需要一种能够确保因果可归因于任务需求而非人类先验的方法。
AI.method: 提出生成式方法论，使用多智能体强化学习中的涌现语言（EL），智能体从最小初始状态（无语言、无自我概念、极少接触人类文本）出发，在纯任务压力下发展通信协议，通过环境复杂性调控和涌现通信的解释来研究意识相关结构。
AI.result: 在最小环境中的概念验证实验表明，智能体发展出自我指涉通信，包括一种回声-失配检测电路，该结构并非由任务结构或架构本身预测，而是由特定的环境可供性涌现产生。
AI.conclusion: 涌现语言方法论为研究意识相关结构提供了因果可归因的生成式途径，环境可供性对涌现结构的塑造作用比任务或架构更关键，为未来设计具有意识相关特征的人工系统提供了新的实验范式。

title: Retrospective Harness Optimization: Improving LLM Agents via Self-Preference over Trajectory Rollouts
summary: AI agents rely on a harness of skills, tools, and workflows to solve complex problems. Continually improving this harness is essential for adapting to new tasks. However, existing optimization methods typically require ground-truth validation sets, yet such labeled data is difficult to acquire in practical deployment settings. To address this problem, we introduce Retrospective Harness Optimization (RHO), a self-supervised method that optimizes the agent harness using only past trajectories. Specifically, RHO selects a diverse coreset of challenging tasks from past trajectories and re-solves them in parallel. The agent analyzes these rollouts using self-validation and self-consistency, then generates candidate harness updates and selects the most effective one by its own pairwise self-preference. We evaluate RHO across three diverse domains, spanning software engineering, technical work, and knowledge work. Notably, a single optimization round improves the pass rate on SWE-Bench Pro from 59% to 78% without any external grading. Furthermore, our analysis demonstrates that RHO effectively targets prior failure modes. As a result, the optimized harness alters the agent's behavior patterns and sustains higher accuracy during long-horizon sessions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为RHO的自监督方法，通过利用历史轨迹中的多样化核心任务集进行并行重求解、自验证和自偏好选择，实现无需外部标签的智能体工具链自动优化，在SWE-Bench Pro上单轮优化即将通过率从59%提升至78%。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体工具链优化方法通常依赖真实标注的验证集，然而在实际部署场景中获取此类标注数据困难且成本高昂，这限制了智能体在新任务上的自适应能力提升。
AI.method: RHO首先从智能体的历史轨迹中选择一个多样化且具有挑战性的核心任务子集，然后对这些任务进行并行重求解；在获取新的轨迹后，智能体通过自验证和自一致性分析评估自身表现，并生成候选的工具链更新方案，最终通过成对自我偏好选择机制选出最优更新。
AI.result: 在软件工程、技术工作和知识工作三个不同领域的实验表明，RHO在无需任何外部评分的情况下，单轮优化即将智能体在SWE-Bench Pro上的通过率从59%提升至78%，并且优化的工具链能够有效针对历史失败模式，改变智能体的行为模式，在长期会话中保持更高的准确率。
AI.conclusion: RHO证明了通过纯自监督方式利用历史轨迹即可有效优化智能体工具链，无需人工标注数据；该方法能够针对性修复历史失败模式，并带来长期会话中的持续性性能提升，为智能体在实际部署中的自适应改进提供了可行路径。

title: EasyLens: A Training-Free Plug-and-Play Subtle-Lesion Representation Amplifier for Medical Vision-Language Models
summary: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) have shown increasing potential for clinical image interpretation, including lesion detection and report generation. However, their practical utility remains limited by insufficient sensitivity to subtle lesions, whose visual evidence is often sparse, low-contrast, and embedded within complex anatomical context. As local visual tokens are aggregated, these weak lesion cues can become underrepresented in global image representations, making them difficult for medical VLMs to recognize. Existing efforts to improve lesion sensitivity mainly rely on medical-domain vision-encoder pre-training, clinical-term-guided alignment, or trainable pathological representation enhancement. Although effective, these approaches usually require additional training or model-specific adaptation and may overfit to particular disease morphologies, limiting their applicability to frozen medical VLMs. To address these limitations, we propose EasyLens, a training-free plug-and-play subtle-lesion representation amplifier for medical VLMs. EasyLens first constructs EasyBank, a pathology-anatomy prototype space that provides lesion-related prototypes and anatomy-aware normal references for comparing suspicious patches against both pathological and normal anatomical patterns. To avoid blindly amplifying normal tissues, EasyTag selects lesion-relevant patches through counterfactual prototype reasoning. To counteract the dilution of subtle lesion cues in global image representations, EasyAmplifier strengthens the selected lesion-relevant patch representations through morphology-guided residual enhancement, thereby increasing their contribution to the global image embedding. Experiments on multiple medical image datasets and frozen medical VLM backbones show that EasyLens improves subtle-lesion detection and outperforms existing encoder-enhancement baselines.

AI.tldr: EasyLens 是一种无需训练、即插即用的亚细病变表示增强方法，通过构建病理-解剖原型空间、反事实原型推理筛选病变补丁以及形态学引导的残差增强，有效提升了冻结医学视觉语言模型对亚细病变的检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现存的医学视觉语言模型（VLM）对亚细病变的敏感性不足，原因是稀疏、低对比度的病变线索在局部视觉token聚合为全局表征时被稀释，而现有增强方案（如医学域视觉编码器预训练、临床术语对齐或可训练病理表征增强）通常需要额外训练或特定模型适配，且易过拟合特定疾病形态，难以适用于冻结的医学VLM。
AI.method: EasyLens 包含三个核心组件：首先构建 EasyBank，一个病理-解剖原型空间，提供病变相关原型和解剖感知的正常参考原型用于比对可疑补丁；其次 EasyTag 通过反事实原型推理筛选出与病变相关的补丁，避免盲目放大正常组织；最后 EasyAmplifier 通过形态学引导的残差增强强化选中病变补丁的表征，提升其对全局图像嵌入的贡献度。
AI.result: 在多个医学图像数据集和冻结的医学VLM骨干上的实验结果表明，EasyLens 能够显著提升亚细病变检测性能，并优于现有的编码器增强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: EasyLens 提供了一种无需额外训练、可即插即用的通用解决方案，能够有效弥补冻结医学VLM在亚细病变识别上的结构性不足，为医学VLMs的临床实用性提升提供了新颖且轻量的技术路径。

title: CollabSim: A CSCW-Grounded Methodology for Investigating Collaborative Competence of LLM Agents through Controlled Multi-Agent Experiments
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) built on large language models have shown growing promise, with their effectiveness resting on agents' ability to coordinate through text-based channels much as human teams do. Yet recent study suggests that MAS often falter not because agents lack individual task-solving ability, but because they lack collaborative competence: the capacity to establish common ground, maintain shared task understanding, balance individual and collective incentives, and repair misalignment as interaction unfolds. Decades of research in Computer-Supported Cooperative Work have characterized these requirements for human teams coordinating under constrained communication, yet existing MAS evaluations focus mainly on task outcomes or single-agent proficiency in reasoning, planning, and tool use. To enable a systematic analysis of agents' collaborative competence in MAS, we introduce CollabSim, a configurable simulation framework that combines a theory-grounded definition of collaborative capabilities, controlled manipulation of interaction conditions, and action-level probing of agents' internal states. Experiments across four LLMs show that CollabSim can capture condition effects, separate model performance patterns, and reveal task-dependent effects of agent design.

AI.tldr: CollabSim 是一个基于计算支持协同工作理论的可配置仿真框架，用于系统性地分析和评估多智能体系统中大语言模型智能体的协作能力，实验表明该框架能有效捕捉条件效应、区分模型行为模式并揭示智能体设计对任务效果的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的多智能体系统评估主要关注任务结果或单智能体在推理、规划和工具使用方面的能力，而忽视了智能体在受限通信条件下建立共同理解、维持共享任务认知、平衡个体与集体激励以及修复交互中错位等协作能力的重要性。
AI.method: 提出 CollabSim 仿真框架，包含三个方面：基于计算支持协同工作理论定义的协作能力框架、对交互条件的受控操控、以及对智能体内部状态的动作级探测，从而实现对多智能体系统中大语言模型智能体协作能力的系统性分析。
AI.result: 在四种大语言模型上的实验表明，CollabSim 能够有效捕获不同交互条件对协作效果的影响，区分不同模型的协作行为模式，并揭示智能体设计选择对任务效果的依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: CollabSim 为系统性分析多智能体系统中的协作能力提供了理论驱动的评估工具，填补了现有评估范式在协作能力维度的空白，并为未来多智能体系统的设计和优化提供了实验支持和理论指导。

title: Towards World Models in Biomedical Research
summary: A central goal of biomedicine is to understand, predict and ultimately control the dynamic mechanisms by which biological systems respond to perturbations, disease progression and therapeutic intervention. Although foundation models and large language models have accelerated biomedical data interpretation, most current systems remain focused on static pattern recognition rather than prospective simulation of biological futures. Here we propose biomedical world models as a paradigm for AI-driven discovery. These models learn latent representations of molecular, cellular, tissue and clinical states, together with intervention-conditioned dynamics that allow future trajectories to be simulated before actions are taken. We discuss how biomedical world models could function as data engines, environment simulators and scientific planning substrates across applications including virtual cells, organoids, virtual patients and surgical simulation. We outline the data infrastructure, evaluation benchmarks, safety constraints and governance frameworks required. Biomedical world models may provide a foundation for simulation-guided, closed-loop and experimentally actionable biomedical discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"生物医学世界模型"这一新范式，通过构建分子、细胞、组织及临床状态的潜在表征并结合干预条件动力学，实现对生物系统未来轨迹的前瞻性模拟，为仿真引导、闭环且可实验验证的生物医学发现提供基础。
AI.motivation: 当前生物医学领域的 foundation models 和大型语言模型主要聚焦于静态模式识别，缺乏对生物系统随时间演化的前瞻性仿真能力，无法有效预测疾病进展、干预响应和治疗效果，亟需一种能动态模拟生物未来状态的建模范式。
AI.method: 提出生物医学世界模型范式，学习分子、细胞、组织和临床状态的潜在表征，并联合建模干预条件驱动的动力学过程，使得在采取实际行动前即可模拟未来轨迹；该方法可充当数据引擎、环境模拟器和科学规划基底，应用场景涵盖虚拟细胞、类器官、虚拟患者及手术仿真。
AI.result: 论文未提供具体实验结果或定量指标，而是系统阐述该范式的概念框架、潜在应用场景（虚拟细胞、类器官、虚拟患者、手术仿真）以及所需的数据基础设施、评估基准、安全约束和治理框架。
AI.conclusion: 生物医学世界模型有望为仿真引导的、闭环的且可实验验证的生物医学发现提供全新基础框架，但其成功依赖于完善的数据基础设施、标准化评估基准、严格的安全约束以及相应的治理体系支撑。

title: HomeWorld: A Unified Floorplan-to-Furnished Framework for Generating Controllable, Densely Interactive Whole-Home Scenes
summary: Indoor scene generation is crucial for robot simulation and modern interior design. However, complex layouts together with scarce 3D scene data make learning-based generation challenging. Existing methods often rely on hand-crafted rules or focus on isolated sub-tasks (e.g., floorplan synthesis or single-room furnishing), producing whole-home scenes that lack global coherence, realism, and simulation readiness. To mitigate these limitations, we propose a unified hierarchical framework that decomposes indoor scene synthesis into controllable stages. First, we curate a large-scale dataset of 300K real residential floorplans to train a large language model for whole-home floorplan generation. With detailed descriptions and a K-D tree-based representation, our method enables fine-grained, controllable whole-home floorplan generation. Building upon the generated whole-home floorplan, we leverage image generation models to draft furniture layouts from multi-level roaming viewpoints, and then generate the layouts of small manipulable objects on different supporting surfaces (e.g., cabinets, desks, and dining tables) for embodied AI simulation. During furniture and object layout generation, a VLM-based refiner iteratively corrects furniture and object placement, and a 3D generative model enables flexible replacement of individual assets. We further attach basic physical attributes and simple surface texture and lighting setups to complete the pipeline for embodied AI use. Experiments and user studies demonstrate that our pipeline produces indoor spaces with greater layout diversity and stronger 3D design appeal, outperforming prior methods on both quantitative and qualitative metrics. Finally, alongside our generation pipeline, we will release the floorplan dataset and 5K fully furnished scenes to the community. Project Page: https://kairos-homeworld.github.io/

AI.tldr: 提出一种统一的分层框架，通过大语言模型生成全局户型图、图像生成模型布局家具、VLM迭代修正以及3D生成模型替换资产，实现从户型到可交互3D室内场景的端到端合成，在布局多样性和设计美感上超越现有方法，并开源30万真实户型数据集和5000套完整场景。
AI.motivation: 现有室内场景生成方法要么依赖手工规则，要么局限于楼层平面合成或单房间家具摆放等子任务，难以生成具有全局连贯性、高真实感且可直接用于具身AI模拟的完整住宅场景；此外，3D场景数据稀缺使得基于学习的全屋生成面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出统一分层框架：1) 基于30万真实住宅户型训练大语言模型，结合K-D树表示实现细粒度可控的全屋户型生成；2) 利用图像生成模型从多层级漫游视角绘制家具布局草案；3) 在不同支撑表面（橱柜、书桌、餐桌等）上生成可操控小物体布局以支持具身AI模拟；4) 基于VLM的精炼器迭代修正家具和物体摆放位置；5) 使用3D生成模型灵活替换单个资产；6) 附加基础物理属性、表面纹理和光照设置完成管线。
AI.result: 实验和用户研究表明，该方法生成的室内空间在布局多样性和3D设计美感上均优于先前方法，在定量和定性指标上取得更优表现；同时将发布30万真实户型数据集和5000套完整装修场景供社区使用。
AI.conclusion: 将多阶段生成（户型→家具布局→小物体布局→物理属性与渲染）统一在分层框架中，并结合大语言模型、图像生成模型、VLM精炼器和3D生成模型，能够有效解决全屋室内场景生成的全局一致性和模拟就绪性问题，为具身AI仿真和室内设计提供了可扩展的数据生成管线。

title: The Self-Correction Illusion: LLMs Correct Others but Not Themselves
summary: Recent work shows that LLM agents struggle to correct errors in their own reasoning traces yet show markedly higher correction rates when identical claims appear under external sources. We ask whether this asymmetry reflects a capability deficit or a role-label artifact: does an agent's willingness to correct a wrong claim depend causally on the chat-template role that carries it, rather than on the claim's content? Our setup keeps the erroneous claim byte-identical across all conditions (SHA-256 verified) and varies only its wrapping role: the agent's own \role{<thought>}, a \role{user} message, a \role{tool} response, or a \role{system <memory>} block. Across 13 model-domain cells covering seven model families and three domains ($n{=}30$ paired tasks per cell), relabeling the claim from \role{<thought>} to an external role lifts the explicit-correction rate by 23 to 93 percentage points, with 10 of 13 cells reaching $p{<}0.001$. Further experiments confirm that the effect is asymmetric, mechanistically decomposable, and robust across domains. The failure to self-correct is not a cognitive deficit; it is a chat-template artifact. We exploit this artifact by designing a prompt-structure-only intervention that requires no training and no model modification, with its strongest role label being domain-dependent: \role{<memory>} dominates on math, while a plain \role{user} message dominates on logical deduction.

AI.tldr: LLM智能体无法自我纠正推理错误并非认知能力缺陷，而是聊天模板中的角色标签伪影：将错误陈述从智能体自己的<thought>角色重新标记为外部角色（如<memory>或<user>），可使显式纠正率提升23–93个百分点；基于此设计了一种仅需修改提示结构的零训练干预方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明，LLM智能体难以纠正自身推理轨迹中的错误，但对相同内容在外部来源下却有显著更高的纠正率；该研究探究这种不对称性究竟是源于真实的能力缺陷，还是仅仅由聊天模板中的角色标签（role-label）这一表面伪影所导致。
AI.method: 保持错误陈述跨所有条件字节完全一致（SHA-256验证），仅改变其包装角色：智能体自身的<thought>、<user>、<tool>或<system <memory>>；在跨越7个模型家族和3个领域的13个模型-领域单元（每单元n=30配对任务）上测量显式纠正率变化，并设计提示结构干预（仅修改角色标签，无需训练或模型改动）。
AI.result: 将错误陈述从<thought>重新标记为外部角色后，显式纠正率提升23–93个百分点，13个单元中有10个达到p<0.001显著性水平；该效应具有不对称性、可机械论分解且跨领域鲁棒；最佳外部角色具有领域依赖性：<memory>在数学领域占优，而<user>在逻辑推理领域占优。
AI.conclusion: LLM自我纠正失败的根源不是认知能力缺陷，而是聊天模板中角色标签设计引起的人为伪影；通过仅修改提示结构（替换角色标签）即可实现有效的零训练干预，为提升LLM推理可靠性提供了简单实用的新思路。

title: A Vision-language Framework for Comparative Reasoning in Radiology
summary: Medical imaging artificial intelligence has achieved strong performance in isolated image interpretation, but remains poorly aligned with radiological practice, where diagnosis and follow-up rely on comparison across prior studies and analogous reference cases. Here we formulate radiological comparison as an entity-aware cross-image reasoning problem and introduce a framework that supports both reference-case retrieval and temporal comparative interpretation. We construct MedReCo-DB, a large-scale comparative imaging resource derived from routine image-report pairs, comprising more than 690,000 images from over 160,000 patients across eight institutions, four countries and seven imaging modalities. Reports are decomposed into anatomical structures, abnormal findings and pathological conditions to provide supervision for entity-conditioned retrieval and comparative visual question answering. Using this resource, we develop MedReCo, an entity-aware visual encoder for controllable retrieval of clinically analogous cases, and MedReCo-VLM, a vision--language extension for generative interpretation of interval change. Across internal, external and cross-center evaluations, MedReCo achieved the highest Recall@1 in all 12 internal retrieval settings and improved external retrieval by a mean of 6.0 percentage points. In clinically confusable differential groups, it consistently outperformed the strongest baselines. MedReCo-VLM achieved the best performance across all comparative generation evaluations and improved longitudinal follow-up accuracy by 14.5-46.5 percentage points on chest radiographs and 13.0-27.9 percentage points on CT. These findings suggest that entity-aware comparative reasoning can be learned from routine clinical data at scale and may provide a more clinically aligned foundation for medical imaging AI.

AI.tldr: 提出实体感知的跨图像推理框架MedReCo和MedReCo-VLM，通过构建大规模多中心医学影像比较资源MedReCo-DB，在参考病例检索和时序比较解读任务上显著超越基线，证明可从临床常规数据中学习实体感知的比较推理能力。
AI.motivation: 当前医学影像AI仅在孤立图像解读上表现良好，但放射学实践依赖于跨前后影像和类比参考病例的比较分析，现有方法缺乏对这一临床核心推理范式的对齐和支持。
AI.method: 构建MedReCo-DB，包含来自8个机构、4个国家、7种模态的超过69万张影像，将报告分解为解剖结构、异常发现和病理状态以提供实体级监督；提出MedReCo实体感知视觉编码器用于可控的临床类比病例检索，以及MedReCo-VLM视觉-语言扩展模型用于时序变化的生成式解读。
AI.result: MedReCo在全部12项内部检索设置中取得Recall@1最优，外部检索平均提升6.0个百分点，在临床易混淆鉴别组中持续优于最强基线；MedReCo-VLM在所有比较生成评估中取得最佳性能，在胸部X光片上纵向随访准确率提升14.5-46.5个百分点，CT上提升13.0-27.9个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 实体感知的比较推理可以从临床常规数据中规模化学习，为医学影像AI提供更贴近临床实践的基础，提示跨影像实体级推理是弥合AI与放射学实践之间差距的关键方向。

title: PLAN-S: Bridging Planning with Latent Style Dynamics for Autonomous Driving World Models
summary: Latent world models (LWMs) have strengthened end-to-end autonomous driving by forecasting compact scene dynamics for downstream planning. However, existing LWM-based planners usually generate trajectories directly from entangled latent representations. This compact latent-to-planner pathway lacks explicit modeling of risk, drivability, and diverse style preferences, making driving-style dynamics difficult to supervise, inspect, or modulate before a final trajectory is selected. We propose PLAN-S (PLANning with latent Style dynamics), a planner-facing bridge that addresses this compactness-controllability dilemma by decoding a style-conditioned, four-channel semantic cost map from the latent representation. The cost map is conditioned on ego state and driving style and is consumed up-stream of the planning decision through two host-side interfaces: attention-level fusion for regression planners and reward-level fusion for anchor-score planners. We validate PLAN-S on two architecturally distinct hosts, ResWorld on nuScenes and WoTE on NAVSIM, while keeping the host backbones frozen to isolate the contribution of the proposed bridge. On nuScenes, PLAN-S reduces L2 at every horizon over the baseline, with 0.55 m average L2 and a 42% relative reduction in the 3 s collision rate. On NAVSIM, the rule-cost variant reaches 89.4 Predictive Driver Model Score (PDMS), while the learned cost variant provides complementary gains on baseline-challenging scenes. Ablations show that the cost pathway contributes most directly to safer trajectory selection. Qualitative results further show that PLAN-S can produce diverse cost maps, with spatially consistent variations aligned to different driving styles.

AI.tldr: PLAN-S通过从潜在世界模型中解码出风格条件化的语义代价地图，解决了端到端自动驾驶中潜在世界模型规划器面临的紧凑性-可控性困境，在无需修改主干网络的情况下显著提升了轨迹安全性和风格可调节性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于潜在世界模型（LWM）的端到端自动驾驶规划器直接从纠缠的潜在表示生成轨迹，这种紧凑的潜在到规划器路径缺乏对风险、可驾驶性和多样化风格偏好的显式建模，导致驾驶风格动态难以在最终轨迹选择前进行监督、检查或调节，即存在紧凑性与可控性之间的困境。
AI.method: PLAN-S提出了一种规划器侧的桥梁模块，从LWM的潜在表示中解码出四通道语义代价地图，该代价地图以自车状态和驾驶风格为条件。通过两种宿端接口（回归规划器的注意力级融合和锚点-分数规划器的奖励级融合）将代价地图注入上游规划决策，以在不修改主干网络的情况下实现可控规划。
AI.result: 在nuScenes上基于ResWorld主干，PLAN-S在每个预测时域上均降低了L2误差，平均L2为0.55米，3秒碰撞率相对降低42%；在NAVSIM上基于WoTE主干，规则代价变体达到89.4 PDMS分数，学习代价变体在基线困难场景上提供互补增益。消融实验表明代价通路对更安全的轨迹选择贡献最直接，定性结果也显示PLAN-S能生成与不同驾驶风格对齐的多样化代价地图。
AI.conclusion: PLAN-S通过引入可解释的语义代价桥梁有效解耦了LWM规划器的紧凑性与可控性，在冻结主干的情况下即可提升安全性与风格多样性，为端到端自动驾驶中潜在世界模型的可控规划提供了一种轻量级、即插即用的解决方案。

title: Thinking with Imagination: Agentic Visual Spatial Reasoning with World Simulators
summary: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have shown strong visual reasoning capabilities, their spatial reasoning abilities remain largely constrained to the observed images and text-oriented chain-of-thought. They often struggle to infer unobserved layouts, maintain cross-view consistency, and reason from alternative viewpoints when only limited egocentric observations are available. In this work, we study this problem as thinking with imagination, where a VLM actively acquires imagined visual evidence by interacting with a world simulator during reasoning. We propose Astra, an agentic spatial reasoning framework that empowers VLMs with action-conditioned visual imagination. Specifically, Astra couples Astra-VL, an RL-trained VLM policy, with Astra-WM, a Bagel-based world simulator that generates novel-view observations from context images and natural-language camera motions. To provide reliable imagined evidence, Astra-WM is trained with view consistency tuning to improve pose and content consistency across views. In the RL stage, we propose a world-simulator-in-the-loop two-phase RL curriculum to stabilize tool-use exploration and advance the model's ability to invoke the simulator only when imagined observations improve over direct answering. Experiments demonstrate that both the world simulator and the agentic policy are necessary: Astra-WM improves simulator-augmented Gemini-3-Flash on MMSI-Bench from 45.1 to 49.5, while Astra-VL improves the Qwen3-VL backbone from 29.8 to 38.8 on MMSI-Bench and from 36.8 to 42.7 on MindCube. These results show that imagined observations can provide useful spatial evidence, but effective world-model-augmented reasoning requires learning when, where, and how to imagine.

AI.tldr: Astra是一个结合强化学习训练的策略网络Astra-VL与基于Bagel的世界模拟器Astra-WM的智能体空间推理框架，通过动作条件化的视觉想象增强VLM的空间推理能力，实验表明想象观测能提供有效空间证据，但需要学习何时、何地以及如何想象。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM在空间推理方面存在固有局限性：它们主要依赖观测图像和文本导向的思维链，难以推断未观测到的布局、保持跨视角一致性以及在有限自我中心观测下从替代视角进行推理。
AI.method: Astra框架由两个核心组件构成：Astra-VL是基于强化学习训练的VLM策略网络，负责决定何时调用世界模拟器；Astra-WM是基于Bagel的世界模拟器，能够从上下文图像和自然语言相机运动指令生成新视角观测图像，并通过视角一致性训练提升跨视角的姿态与内容一致性。RL阶段采用世界模拟器在环的两阶段课程学习，先稳定工具使用探索，再提升模型仅在想象观测优于直接回答时调用模拟器的能力。
AI.result: Astra-WM将模拟器增强的Gemini-3-Flash在MMSI-Bench上的性能从45.1提升至49.5；Astra-VL将Qwen3-VL骨干网络在MMSI-Bench上从29.8提升至38.8，在MindCube上从36.8提升至42.7。
AI.conclusion: 世界模拟器与智能体策略都是必要的：想象观测能够提供有用的空间证据，但有效的世界模型增强推理需要模型学会何时、何地以及如何调用想象机制，而非盲目使用。

title: Would you still call this Dax? Novel Visual References in VLMs and Humans
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs), like human learners, are frequently exposed to new visual concepts, but how they map novel visual references to language after exposure remains largely underexplored, particularly when those references contradict prior knowledge from pre-training. To study this, we present the Novel Visual References Dataset (NVRD): 19,176 images spanning 90 visual concepts across different levels of visual novelty, each with up to 20 increasingly perturbed versions of the original object to probe generalization. Unlike prior work on visual augmentations of familiar concepts, NVRD comprises entirely novel, open-ended stimuli constructed from scratch, mirroring how humans encounter genuinely new concepts. We evaluate 3 open- and 2 closed-source models alongside 2,400 human judgments for direct human-model comparison, and find that (i) models struggle to acquire novel concepts in-context when they contradict prior knowledge, and (ii) while models and humans show correlated sensitivity to visual perturbations, models significantly overgeneralize, extending learned labels to stimuli that humans reject. We contribute NVRD as a corpus and benchmark for research on visual concept learning in both humans and machines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NVRD数据集，包含19,176张覆盖90个视觉概念及不同程度扰动的图像，用于研究视觉语言模型在上下文学习中习得与预训练知识相矛盾的新颖视觉概念时的泛化能力，实验发现模型在概念习得上存在困难且显著过泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注视觉语言模型对熟悉概念的增强或扰动，但模型如何将新颖视觉参照映射到语言（尤其是当这些参照与预训练知识相矛盾时）仍缺乏系统研究，人类与模型在新颖视觉概念学习上的对比也未有充分探索。
AI.method: 构建了Novel Visual References Dataset (NVRD)，包含19,176张图像，涵盖90个视觉概念，每个概念提供最多20个逐渐增强的扰动版本以测试泛化能力；评估了3个开源和2个闭源视觉语言模型，并收集了2,400个人类判断进行直接的人机对比。
AI.result: 模型在上下文学习中习得与先验知识矛盾的新颖概念时表现困难；模型与人类对视觉扰动的敏感性虽呈相关性，但模型显著过泛化，将学到的标签扩展到人类拒绝接受的刺激上。
AI.conclusion: NVRD可作为研究人类与机器视觉概念学习的基准语料库，揭示了当前视觉语言模型在应对新颖视觉概念时的泛化能力不足与过泛化倾向，为未来改进模型的概念学习机制提供了方向。

title: RedditPersona: A Modular Framework for Community-Conditioned LLM Adaptation from Reddit
summary: Community-conditioned language model adaptation requires choices about data collection, community definition, and evaluation that are currently made independently in each study, making it hard to compare assumptions or reuse artifacts. We present RedditPersona, a modular framework that standardizes these choices: it collects Reddit posts and comments, profiles active users, partitions them under five grouping strategies (subreddit-based, graph-structural, semantic, hybrid, and interaction-based), trains a parameter-efficient adapter per strategy via QLoRA, and evaluates them under a shared metric suite spanning fluency, fidelity, distributional alignment, and community identifiability. Applied to 112 subreddits in the urban well-being domain (301,429 user profiles, 16M+ comments), we find that adapters' behavioral identifiability tracks each strategy's intrinsic agreement with the subreddit baseline, and that a consistent trade-off between identifiability and distributional similarity to real text holds across all five strategies. The code and configuration files are available at: https://github.com/Ahghaffari/redditpersona.

AI.tldr: RedditPersona是一个模块化框架，用于标准化社区条件语言模型适配中的社区定义、数据收集和评估流程，在112个Reddit子版块（30万+用户画像，1600万+评论）上通过五种分组策略和QLoRA适配器训练，发现行为可识别性与策略内在一致性相关，且可识别性与分布相似性之间存在一致的权衡。
AI.motivation: 当前社区条件语言模型适配研究中，数据收集、社区定义和评估方式的选择在每个研究中独立进行，导致研究假设难以比较、实验工件难以复用，缺乏统一的标准化框架来系统化这些关键环节。
AI.method: 提出RedditPersona模块化框架，包含四个标准化环节：从Reddit收集帖子和评论数据、分析活跃用户画像、在五种分组策略（基于子版块、图结构、语义、混合和基于交互）下对用户进行划分、使用QLoRA对每个策略训练参数高效适配器，并在统一的评估指标套件（包括流畅度、忠实度、分布对齐和社区可识别性）下进行评测。
AI.result: 在112个城市幸福感相关的子版块（301,429个用户画像、1600万+条评论）上实验表明，适配器的行为可识别性反映了每种分组策略与子版块基线之间的内在一致性，且所有五种策略均在可识别性与生成文本的真实分布相似性之间存在一致的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过标准化社区条件语言模型适配的流程，揭示了不同分组策略在可识别性与分布对齐之间的固有权衡，为后续社区语言建模研究提供了可复用的框架和基准。

title: Almieyar-Oryx-BloomBench: A Bilingual Multimodal Benchmark for Cognitively Informed Evaluation of Vision-Language Models
summary: Despite the rapid progress of Vision-Language Models (VLMs), the field lacks benchmarks that rigorously diagnose their true reasoning abilities and chart meaningful progress toward human-like multimodal intelligence. Most existing evaluations focus on piecemeal or disconnected tasks, obscuring critical cognitive weaknesses and providing little insight for targeted improvement. To address this gap, we introduce BloomBench, part of the Almieyar benchmarking series, the first cognitively human-grounded, bilingual (English-Arabic) multimodal benchmark for VLMs. Grounded in Bloom's Taxonomy, BloomBench systematically evaluates six levels of cognition (Remember, Understand, Apply, Analyze, Evaluate, Create) through carefully designed image-question-answer tasks. Built with a semi-automated pipeline and validated through a stratified hybrid quality assurance protocol, it ensures scalability, cultural inclusivity, and linguistic fidelity. Leveraging this framework, we conduct a comprehensive study of state-of-the-art VLMs to diagnose their cognitive profiles. Our analysis reveals a sharp cognitive asymmetry: while state-of-the-art models achieve strong performance ceilings in semantic understanding, they struggle substantially with factual recall and creative synthesis. This demonstrates that current general multimodal proficiency masks deeper limitations in specific cognitive layers. Furthermore, our study highlights a critical performance gap between Arabic and English, exposing limitations in current cross-lingual multimodal reasoning. These findings establish a foundation for developing more cognitively aligned and inclusive VLMs. The benchmark framework and dataset is available at: https://github.com/qcri/Almieyar-Oryx-BloomBench.

AI.tldr: BloomBench是一个基于布鲁姆认知分类法、首个面向视觉语言模型的双语（英-阿）多模态推理基准，系统评估六个认知层级，揭示出现有VLM在语义理解上表现优异但在事实回忆和创造性合成上存在显著缺陷，并暴露了跨语言推理能力的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）评估基准多聚焦于碎片化或彼此无关的任务，无法严格诊断模型真正的推理能力，也未能揭示其认知层面的关键弱点，难以为模型改进提供针对性指导。
AI.method: 提出了BloomBench，首个基于布鲁姆认知分类法、以人类认知为根基的双语（英语-阿拉伯语）多模态基准，通过精心设计的图像-问题-答案任务系统评估六个认知层级（记忆、理解、应用、分析、评价、创造），采用半自动化构建流水线和分层混合质量保证协议以确保可扩展性、文化包容性和语言保真度。
AI.result: 对多个最先进VLM的全面评测揭示了显著的认知不对称性：模型在语义理解层达到较高性能上限，但在事实回忆和创造性合成任务上表现严重不足；同时，模型在阿拉伯语与英语之间存在显著的性能差距，暴露了当前跨语言多模态推理的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 当前通用多模态能力掩盖了模型在特定认知层面的深层缺陷，亟需开发更符合认知对齐和更具包容性的VLM；该基准框架为未来的认知导向型多模态智能研究奠定了基础。

title: Memory is Reconstructed, Not Retrieved: Graph Memory for LLM Agents
summary: Despite recent progress, LLM agents still struggle with reasoning over long interaction histories. While current memory-augmented agents rely on a static retrieve-then-reason paradigm, this rigid pipeline design prevents them from dynamically adapting memory access to intermediate evidence discovered during inference. To bridge this gap, we propose MRAgent, a framework that combines an associative memory graph with an active reconstruction mechanism. We represent memory as a Cue-Tag-Content graph, where associative tags serve as semantic bridges connecting fine-grained cues to memory contents. Operating on this structure, our active reconstruction mechanism integrates LLM reasoning directly into memory access, allowing the agent to iteratively explore and prune retrieval paths based on accumulated evidence. This ensures that memory retrieval is dynamically adapted to the reasoning context while avoiding combinatorial explosion caused by unconstrained expansion. Experiments on the LoCoMo benchmark and LongMemEval benchmark demonstrate significant improvements over strong baselines (up to 23%), while substantially reducing token and runtime cost, highlighting the effectiveness of active and associative reconstruction for long-horizon memory reasoning.

AI.tldr: MRAgent通过结合关联记忆图与主动重构机制，使LLM智能体在长历史交互推理中能够动态调整记忆检索路径，在LoCoMo和LongMemEval基准上相较强基线提升高达23%，同时显著降低token消耗和运行时间。
AI.motivation: 现有基于记忆增强的LLM智能体采用静态的“检索-推理”流水线范式，无法在推理过程中根据中间发现的证据动态调整记忆访问策略，导致长历史交互推理性能受限。
AI.method: MRAgent构建了Cue-Tag-Content关联记忆图，其中关联标签作为语义桥梁连接细粒度线索与记忆内容；并基于此图设计了主动重构机制，将LLM推理直接融入记忆访问过程，使智能体能够根据累积证据迭代地探索和剪枝检索路径，在动态适应推理上下文的同时避免组合爆炸。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo和LongMemEval两个基准上的实验表明，MRAgent相较强基线取得了最高23%的性能提升，同时显著降低了token消耗和运行时间成本。
AI.conclusion: 主动且关联的记忆重构机制能够有效提升LLM智能体在长时记忆推理中的表现，证明了将推理过程与记忆访问动态融合是克服静态检索-推理范式局限性的可行方向。

title: Learning Visual Spatial Planning from Symbolic State via Modality-Gap-Aware Self-Distillation
summary: While vision-language models excel at general multimodal understanding, they still struggle with visual spatial planning. We attribute this to a perception-reasoning modality gap: visual planning requires models to infer latent state structures from pixels and then reason over the recovered structure to produce valid actions, whereas symbolic planning directly leverages explicit objects and constraints. This creates dual bottlenecks in visual state recovery and multi-step planning. To address this, we propose MGSD, a two-stage modality-gap-aware self-distillation framework. First, a cold-start grounding stage equips the visual student with reliable state representations, minimizing early perception noise. Second, a privileged teacher transfers planning capabilities via on-policy distillation, using explicit symbolic states to supervise the student's own visual rollout prefixes. Crucially, symbolic data is used strictly during training, leaving inference purely visual. Experiments on visual planning benchmarks show that MGSD consistently improves visual planning across both 4B and 8B backbones, raising the macro average by 19.3% and 18.4%, respectively. The resulting models narrow the gap to symbolic-input upper bounds, while ablations and diagnostics confirm that the improvement comes from both visual state recovery and optimal-path reasoning. These results suggest that modality-gap-aware self-distillation improves not only how models perceive actionable states, but also how they plan over the inferred structure. Code is available at https://github.com/Oranger-l/MGSD.

AI.tldr: 提出MGSD，一种两阶段模态差距感知自蒸馏框架，通过冷启动接地阶段和特权教师蒸馏阶段弥合视觉空间规划中的感知-推理模态差距，在视觉规划任务上将宏观平均性能提升19.3%（4B）和18.4%（8B）。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型在通用多模态理解上表现优异，但在视觉空间规划方面仍存在困难，其根本原因在于感知-推理模态差距：视觉规划需要先推断像素背后的潜在状态结构，再基于恢复的结构进行多步推理以产生有效动作，而符号规划直接利用显式的对象和约束，因此视觉规划面临状态恢复和多步规划的双重瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出MGSD，一种两阶段模态差距感知自蒸馏框架：第一阶段为冷启动接地阶段，通过显式符号状态监督使视觉学生模型获得可靠的状态表示，减少早期感知噪声；第二阶段为特权教师蒸馏阶段，利用符号规划器作为特权教师，通过on-policy蒸馏方式，用显式符号状态监督学生模型自身的视觉rollout前缀，从而将规划能力从符号教师迁移至视觉学生；符号数据仅在训练阶段使用，推理阶段完全依赖视觉输入。
AI.result: 在视觉规划基准上，MGSD在4B和8B骨干网络上分别将宏观平均性能提升19.3%和18.4%，显著缩小了与符号输入上界模型之间的差距；消融实验和诊断分析证实，性能提升同时来源于视觉状态恢复能力和最优路径推理能力的改善。
AI.conclusion: 模态差距感知自蒸馏不仅能提升模型感知可行动状态的能力，还能改善模型在推断结构上进行规划的能力，表明同时解决感知瓶颈和推理瓶颈是缩小视觉规划与符号规划之间差距的有效路径。

title: Integrating Mechanistic and Data-Driven Models for Neurological Disorders through Differentiable Programming
summary: Advances in computational modeling, neuroimaging, and artificial intelligence are revolutionizing the modeling of neurological disorders for improved diagnostics, prognosis, and treatment planning. Mechanistic models provide valuable scientific insight into the disorders, but in practice they are often simplified with assumptions or computationally expensive and slow to solve. However, while purely data driven approaches provide speed and scalability, they require large, high quality data to train and generally suffer from interpretability and generalization issues. This perspective paper presents a structured overview of hybrid modeling strategies, which combine deep learning models with physics based solvers, and are categorized into parallel, series, and parallel-series architectures. Three main approaches that have been emphasized are residual modeling for missing or incomplete physics, Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (NODEs) for continuous time dynamics approximation, and solver in the loop that accelerates traditional solvers with neural approximations. These hybrid models integrate the governing differential equation based formulations and deep learning to characterize the evolution of neurological disorders, and promise advanced personalized neurological modeling. In addition, the study explores and proposes different hybrid configurations to improve diagnosis accuracy, predict disease progression, and inform treatment strategies across a range of neurological disorders. These capabilities outperform standalone mechanistic or purely data driven approaches, making hybrid modeling a powerful tool, especially in applications involving modeling the progression and treatment responses in neurological conditions such as brain tumors, Alzheimer's disease, and stroke.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地综述了混合建模策略（将深度学习与基于物理方程的求解器相结合）在神经系统疾病建模中的应用，重点介绍了并行、序列和并行-序列三种架构，以及残差建模、神经常微分方程（NODE）和求解器在环三种主要方法，展示了其在脑肿瘤、阿尔茨海默病和中风等疾病诊断、进展预测和治疗规划中优于纯机制模型或纯数据驱动方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 纯机制模型虽然能提供对神经系统疾病的科学洞察，但往往因简化假设而失去准确性，或因计算成本高、求解速度慢而难以实用；纯数据驱动方法虽具备速度和可扩展性，但依赖大规模高质量数据，且可解释性和泛化能力不足。因此，亟需一种既能保留物理规律约束又能利用深度学习效率的混合建模策略来弥补两者的不足。
AI.method: 本文系统梳理了混合建模策略，将其按架构分为并行（parallel）、序列（series）和并行-序列（parallel-series）三类，并重点阐述了三种核心方法：残差建模（residual modeling）用于补全缺失或不完整的物理过程，神经常微分方程（NODE）用于逼近连续时间动力学，以及求解器在环（solver in the loop）通过神经网络近似加速传统求解器。这些混合模型将基于微分方程的机理公式与深度学习相结合，以刻画神经系统疾病的演化过程。
AI.result: 该研究表明，混合建模策略在诊断准确性、疾病进展预测和治疗策略制定方面均优于纯机制模型或纯数据驱动方法，尤其在脑肿瘤、阿尔茨海默病和中风等神经系统疾病的病程建模与治疗反应预测中展现出显著优势，为实现个性化神经建模提供了有效工具。
AI.conclusion: 混合建模通过整合物理机理与数据驱动方法，在保持可解释性和泛化能力的同时提升了计算效率和预测性能，是推进神经系统疾病个性化诊断、预后评估和治疗规划的重要发展方向，具有广泛的临床应用前景。
